name: Reverend Warnock
subject: I can’t have Herschel Walker representing my mama
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
C’mon folks, I can’t have Herschel Walker representing my mama.
But this race is still a toss-up, and we’re down to the final days.
Georgia's next senator will be determined by who shows up on Election Day, so I’m asking you to chip in $5 so we can reach every Georgian and tell them to stand up for my mama, and every mama, in Georgia. Because all of our mamas deserve better than Herschel Walker.
**[We need to reach every Georgian we can, but our movement is 100% people-powered, so we can only do that with your help. Will you chip in $5 before midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55545226/382014562/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5268-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjlhNWNjNC0yZjc0LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ioVXwgt-LqH8wBejw8Sl3RbSdaS5QcbLzA6VWCNfzzU=)**
Thanks,
Rev. Raphael Warnock
**P.S.** My mom – who grew up picking someone else’s cotton in Waycross, Georgia – just picked her youngest son to represent her in the Senate. Let’s get it done for her and every other Georgian!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55545227/382014563/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5268-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjlhNWNjNC0yZjc0LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ioVXwgt-LqH8wBejw8Sl3RbSdaS5QcbLzA6VWCNfzzU=)

clean_body: Get us across that finish line! | We are so close, Derek! I am so proud of our campaign volunteers down in Georgia and we want to make sure that we can keep up the momentum through December 6. Are you able to help us hit $7,500 on our meter for Georgia? We have been inching our way there but we need your help getting us across that finish line. Your generosity so far has translated to over 3,000 voter contacts this weekend. Imagine how many more we can get if you donate now. -\--------- Forwarded message --------- From: The Young Democrats <info@yda.org> Date: December 04, 2022 at 4:20 PM EDT Subject: FW: We're in the homestretch! | We just wanted to share who you are helping out right now, Derek. Because supporters like you, this is one of our many teams in the ground right now in Georgia getting out the vote for Senator Warnock: | ** All of these Young Dems have had their housing paid for down in Georgia because of you. So far this weekend, your financial support have added more than 2,000 voter contacts that we wouldn't previously had. That is huge! We have 2 more days to get the vote out for the Georgia Runoff and re-elect Senator Warnock. Let's continue to help our volunteers these next 2 days by adding $2,000 more to our Georgia campaign fund. We are all in on Georgia until December 6th. Keep fighting the good fight. Onward, YDA | The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. To help us mobilize the next generation of Democrats,** | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Sent via . name: Action Alert (via DLCC)
subject: re: public evidence of January 6th hearings
body:
The House select committee is set to release evidence to the public. | | |
---
| | Now that Democrats have lost the House, Kevin McCarthy and Jim Jordan are threatening to investigate the January 6th Select Committee – potentially cherry-picking evidence to sabotage Democrats. So the Committee chairs are pledging to release _all_ evidence collected to the public before the year is over. So we’re polling local Democrats – [_**We need to know whether or not you support the committee’s decision as this session of Congress wraps up >> >>**_](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0oQKCOhIvFUpduf6c5nVvFjvsJ2Jt-CPGUusIHocRgMvzaiqhIfBlTUDmEC8GJd64a8Olq-Eb1mwIph-VV7XMN25vNe9b93i8S5rpGu_mErr73P2nha6zYv2w2ENRtV_tuL7XIkGj3e4bv50L67WnOQHolC3ELmHrdd0V6FcEjmSip7Lh7PQzc5Sxtk9y5JjojyGytSuKaUGFEW-W_d_LjMUtjsY8dN5CY2tJxQw6TeD6PZYwa3jZp7C7xGK8DNy7PFTiDpG-HwfCxLRoAH0_z3Xl7UIo00eU-sn31HkvmTUTMBrQcGoIKUiFcmyfuG9CfqhhjYhvbuvV4MiYCkCPIWyhTVFVHRPX_u_PoJgl6Q8EiWU7vsIw8Uztqo7v3LYkQ/3rq/LEcHSQ_iQfuCM2riuK8yyw/h0/6GwIM9vw5gL9bm0Ng8c8bvtkp-Qze83Sb1msGagdRu8) | **Do you support the House Select Committee releasing all January 6th evidence publicly?**

Warnock needs every single bit of help he can get if we’re going to defend his seat and give Democrats a 51-seat majority. Herschel is exactly what this country needs right now. He's a fighter who loves this country. |
---

**"I hope you'll join me in standing with Herschel Walker and help us win back this seat."
- Tim Scott**
[** JOIN ME: STAND WITH HERSCHEL WALKER **](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=97d83d56125a4c4e8322e841ef4cc990&_e=OESKxtNG0X7dP6BJUSjiVlgC03ZFZiZDbdSHwOR3_xhhheX6c29ccAq2AKt0pqbQi0yJcHLAAJt8cnVjg23KU7Gbedi4NEs1c6UKikSbrwaA47UdSDvQ--KjwuZLnTSh2v9GHKKwsSYFg6x3-kLzObvR3g6B5FJXJY-VCKv3fisSycrMEsqwR_Kvpe4gRaAwvklpXq57q8rrmUZRzIn9RXrKnSSUo8QocavYqdSW7pHGGDWlsL9BN9Z24OAlGYnL__nSTmYrCkfkWZWyU45cTpArY0J8170NrgOUmGPpjS9wodBVBHsHGiVuSra76SrBDi6wM7aDgOLyqny6BUYtLWJDs7TPMUWN_u_9m-o6LJEIJtxpc9-KluCmoGQINNKXkq7AndH-gjt8q2QqbEf0b7AR_j31jnUWS-clMAvzRutSM-gMZ3dBHuzu3SNZ7trj)
This will be the most important email you read today.

**[My friend, Herschel Walker, is fighting for the soul of our nation in the most important Senate race in the country. The stakes couldn't be any higher. So I'm humbly asking if you could pitch in just $5, $10, or even $50 right now to win this seat.](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=97d83d56125a4c4e8322e841ef4cc990&_e=OESKxtNG0X7dP6BJUSjiVlgC03ZFZiZDbdSHwOR3_xhhheX6c29ccAq2AKt0pqbQi0yJcHLAAJt8cnVjg23KU7Gbedi4NEs1c6UKikSbrwaA47UdSDvQ--KjwuZLnTSh2v9GHKKwsSYFg6x3-kLzObvR3g6B5FJXJY-VCKv3fisSycrMEsqwR_Kvpe4gRaAwvklpXq57q8rrmUZRzIn9RXrKnSSUo8QocavYqdSW7pHGGDWlsL9BN9Z24OAlGYnL__nSTmYrCkfkWZWyU45cTpArY0J8170NrgOUmGPpjS-9OoNTvc5GX3Wdcwq_iZnNAFv4WyHXPFHivX3YAI8EkdndrOpA2JkDOqCYuTma4OeA6ndl2yEE0TMzX-Jj9GZZZ3-waQY-aX22v1oOObznVxCZX_IqvBrTKZnT9YhbZfoTA5QIBRRBg3Gn7z_ra5QH)**

[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=97d83d56125a4c4e8322e841ef4cc990&_e=OESKxtNG0X7dP6BJUSjiVlgC03ZFZiZDbdSHwOR3_xhhheX6c29ccAq2AKt0pqbQi0yJcHLAAJt8cnVjg23KU7Gbedi4NEs1c6UKikSbrwaA47UdSDvQ--KjwuZLnTSh2v9GHKKwsSYFg6x3-kLzObvR3g6B5FJXJY-VCKv3fisSycrMEsqwR_Kvpe4gRaAwvklpXq57q8rrmUZRzIn9RXrKnSSUo8QocavYqdSW7pHGGDWlsL9BN9Z24OAlGYnL__nSTmYrCkfkWZWyU45cTpArY0J8170NrgOUmGPpjS_vkRTMqxi3t2z7Lt_E6bU-SfTACPn_3dmKEqTi2CqjhRcrO1PJ5PzDeurJFb1X3UYT650raVUJrEtLQS2ceRxIMGlAFhl-QuYD3wTRhzuX-DbkmYxBtJJUkNwHtPqnx-_f4k8KB5F7NqGDc2Y2Z9iJ)
Herschel is running against the far-left Raphael Warnock, who has voted in lock-step with the likes of Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren, and Chuck Schumer.

If Warnock wins this seat, he will no doubt be the deciding vote when Radical Democrats try to pass their socialist agenda and continue to tank our economy, destroy our borders, and ruin this country.

**Herschel is exactly what this country needs right now. He's a fighter who loves this country, and he'll do whatever it takes to see America return to greatness.**

But now that this race is in a runoff, every Democrat in the country has their eyes on it.

They've already spent hundreds of millions to defeat Herschel leading up to Election Day, and they're spending even more to help Warnock keep his seat in the runoff.

_The difference between winning and losing could come down to just a couple of votes, and that's why it's critical we have the support of everyone reading this._

**[If everyone on this list joined me in supporting Herschel, he'll have what it takes to win this toss-up seat. clean_body: Herschel is exactly what this country needs right now. He's a fighter who loves this country. | "I hope you'll join me in standing with Herschel Walker and help us win back this seat." - Tim Scott This will be the most important email you read today. Herschel is running against the far-left Raphael Warnock, who has voted in lock-step with the likes of Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren, and Chuck Schumer. If Warnock wins this seat, he will no doubt be the deciding vote when Radical Democrats try to pass their socialist agenda and continue to tank our economy, destroy our borders, and ruin this country. Herschel is exactly what this country needs right now. He's a fighter who loves this country, and he'll do whatever it takes to see America return to greatness. But now that this race is in a runoff, every Democrat in the country has their eyes on it. They've already spent hundreds of millions to defeat Herschel leading up to Election Day, and they're spending even more to help Warnock keep his seat in the runoff. The difference between winning and losing could come down to just a couple of votes, and that's why it's critical we have the support of everyone reading this. I'm pleading, Fellow American. Thank you, and God bless, Tim Scott | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

Election Integrity Survey Response: [PENDING]
_Peter -- what an honor!_
To advisors at Republican HQ just handpicked your name to receive EARLY ACCESS to our [**Official 2023 Election Integrity Survey**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62023379:Jp7eKEGcN:m:1:3331421248:772ACDBD41161F9972A7CE399899CDE6:r).

Are you ready?

name: Herschel Walker
subject: It’s all going to come down to turnout
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62023395:6w9VdEGNl:m:1:3331421248:1CBE1834E72C8A411E0F7980F9FC1316:r)
---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62023395:6w9VdEGNl:m:1:3331421248:1CBE1834E72C8A411E0F7980F9FC1316:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62023395:6w9VdEGNl:m:1:3331421248:1CBE1834E72C8A411E0F7980F9FC1316:r)

**Today's Goal:** Have 10,000 folks like you chip in so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters.

**How we win:** By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th.
**[Please, if you can, chip in today to help us expand our voter turnout operation.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62023395:6w9VdEGNl:m:1:3331421248:1CBE1834E72C8A411E0F7980F9FC1316:r)**

[** Help Us Expand Our Ground Game

Chip in $25 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62023395:6w9VdEGNl:m:1:3331421248:1CBE1834E72C8A411E0F7980F9FC1316:r)
We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. **A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want.**

I sincerely hope you'll answer the call.

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62023395:6w9VdEGNl:m:1:3331421248:1CBE1834E72C8A411E0F7980F9FC1316:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62023395:6w9VdEGNl:m:1:3331421248:1CBE1834E72C8A411E0F7980F9FC1316:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62023396:6w9VdEGNl:m:1:3331421248:1CBE1834E72C8A411E0F7980F9FC1316:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62023397:6w9VdEGNl:m:1:3331421248:1CBE1834E72C8A411E0F7980F9FC1316:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62023398:6w9VdEGNl:m:1:3331421248:1CBE1834E72C8A411E0F7980F9FC1316:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62023399:6w9VdEGNl:m:1:3331421248:1CBE1834E72C8A411E0F7980F9FC1316:r)

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: I’m in Georgia, Biden’s in Boston
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter,

Just when I think I've seen it all, something new happens in the Georgia Senate runoff.

**Joe Biden campaigned yesterday for Raphael Warnock ... in BOSTON.**

The Warnock campaign is scared to be seen with President Biden on the same stage, so they sent him to NEW ENGLAND where he attended a phone bank at a union hall making calls to voters in GEORGIA.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62023870:6zfOhEGN-:m:1:3345639852:E95FC82D4B846F6CAC5730E6FF16732C:r)
**Not only did President Biden make calls into Georgia to get out the vote for Warnock, but he also helped Warnock raise MILLIONS of LIBERAL DOLLARS at a Boston fundraiser.**

Peter, yesterday I campaigned for Herschel IN GEORGIA (I know - a shocking concept). While I was there, I recorded a short video about the race after a quick lunch at Waffle House (a great Georgia-based company). **[Click here to watch the video:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62023870:6zfOhEGN-:m:1:3345639852:E95FC82D4B846F6CAC5730E6FF16732C:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62023870:6zfOhEGN-:m:1:3345639852:E95FC82D4B846F6CAC5730E6FF16732C:r)
**Raphael Warnock votes with Joe Biden 96% of the time, but he doesn't want Georgians to know. Biden's policies are so unpopular in Georgia that Senator Warnock sent the President to campaign 1,000 miles away from Atlanta!**

Democrats are pouring money into Georgia from liberal states like Massachusetts and California because they know Raphael Warnock is a reliable vote for their radical agenda.

**[Don't let Massachusetts buy a 3rd senator. Please, help Herschel in the final hours of this race. Chip in.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62023870:6zfOhEGN-:m:1:3345639852:E95FC82D4B846F6CAC5730E6FF16732C:r)**

With the runoff election on Tuesday, IT'S NOW OR NEVER!

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62023870:6zfOhEGN-:m:1:3345639852:E95FC82D4B846F6CAC5730E6FF16732C:r)

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Bezos & Musk investing billions to transform America
body:
This is troubling. Have you heard of COP26?
| Dear Reader, This is troubling. Have you heard of [COP26?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zspr70n6fn9d0jfhv3tkg6l7pk9fkdjr1irvoec8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9gmcob2c9h2bs) Almost nobody has. Amid the distractions caused by lingering health issues, conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation... Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world's most powerful people, including:
* U.S. President, Joe Biden...
* British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson...
* Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau...
* French President Emmanuel Macron...
* ... and many more...

From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a $150 trillion 'global transition' of our economy. Since then, Bank of America has [signed this accord,](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zacc509v2h6iln0ob5v1ob26ofqc1922dr9g7is0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9gmcob2c9h2bs) along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world's biggest companies. Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this 'transformation' as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins has followed the money... [And what she's found is startling. ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6rfvsm8sfhmgncjghi5a1poao5jq1f7ss369gl8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9gmcob2c9h2bs) She says: **" While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines calling for a stock market crash, I've found evidence that shows where the elites are spending $150 trillion to 'transform' the economy. Most Americans will be shocked when they see what happens next."** I had to know more, so I scheduled an interview for Nomi to go deeper into the details of this 'transformation.' She agreed to do the interview on one condition: she wanted to record it so she could get her message in front of as many Americans as possible before it's too late. [Go here to see how this ‘transformation’ will play out – and what it means for your money.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zct5vd21559n1t44a1ql9lrpggj15ds1etp3cl90_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9gmcob2c9h2bs) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, _Distortion Report_
---

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: Revealed: FBI illegally arrests U.S. Marine combat veteran 🚨
body:
On January 6, 2021, Jesus Rivera, a Marine combat veteran, peacefully recorded the events at the Capitol building in Washington, D.C. He shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. | | | [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62024194:JT2-DEGNZ:m:1:3317145305:8B72791ECB90AD9B47BC5E3794F2EF2F:r)
---
| | |
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62024194:JT2-DEGNZ:m:1:3317145305:8B72791ECB90AD9B47BC5E3794F2EF2F:r) Hi Peter,

**[Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62024194:JT2-DEGNZ:m:1:3317145305:8B72791ECB90AD9B47BC5E3794F2EF2F:r)**

(Because you're a valued supporter of Freedom Watch, I had to rush you this urgent update about my client, Jesus Rivera. Please bear with me if you've seen some of this information before... it will be shocking to new supporters.)

On January 6, 2021, Jesus Rivera, a Marine combat veteran, peacefully recorded the events at the Capitol building in Washington, D.C. He shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida.

He didn't protest (when I first heard his story, I thought he did).

Jesus didn't attack police or use harsh language. He only shot video to provide for his wife and kids and entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

**But around 7:30 AM on January 20, 2021, between 12 to 20 heavily armed FBI agents raided his home with guns drawn. There was no probable cause, and the search warrant was obtained through lies and even outright fraud.
**
Jesus was forcefully handcuffed, then moved to the FBI building.

His wife asked for the warrant several times but didn't receive it until after the FBI agents finished searching their home.

Jesus survived rocket attacks and exploding roadside bombs trying to bring freedom to Iraq and Afghanistan. But his freedom gets trampled on right here at home by Biden's Gestapo DOJ and its FBI!

**What's more, Jesus recently appeared before District Judge Colleen Kollar-Kotelly in Washington, D.C. and was unjustly sentenced to 8 months in federal prison.
**
Let me tell you, I've locked horns several times with Judge Kollar-Kotelly.

She's a hardcore leftist whose nomination was opposed by every conservative group in the country. She's the absolute worst judge I've appeared before in 45 years.

And now she's throwing a true patriot and innocent man to the wolves.

**Peter, I've filed a critically important class action lawsuit on behalf of Jesus Rivera ' and on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who is getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
I'm suing everyone responsible for this outrage: the lead agents, each agent who searched Jesus' home, even FBI Director Christopher Wray.

The shocking, un-American conduct as alleged in my lawsuit can't be allowed to go on.

**If the FBI can push around a peaceful, church-going Marine veteran for simply recording the events at the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.
**
That's why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents ' AND WIN!
**
And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court.

[**Peter, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift RIGHT NOW.
**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62024194:JT2-DEGNZ:m:1:3317145305:8B72791ECB90AD9B47BC5E3794F2EF2F:r)
I'm using two powerful class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

[**Please give what you can right away.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62024194:JT2-DEGNZ:m:1:3317145305:8B72791ECB90AD9B47BC5E3794F2EF2F:r)

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Peter, you can read more about my urgent class action lawsuit on behalf of Jesus Rivera and all January 6 peaceful protesters by just[clicking on this link](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62024194:JT2-DEGNZ:m:1:3317145305:8B72791ECB90AD9B47BC5E3794F2EF2F:r) and selecting the view button. After, simply scroll down to read the legal document.

[**Then think of U.S. Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera and each of the January 6 Peaceful Protesters I'm fighting for... and dig deep and give a vital $25, $50, $100 or more right away.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62024194:JT2-DEGNZ:m:1:3317145305:8B72791ECB90AD9B47BC5E3794F2EF2F:r)

name: Senator Marco Rubio
subject: Asking from the bottom of my heart
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62023979:6tQRiEGNT:m:1:3331421248:ADDBA763AB0A0CB7A3769D8EDDC7BE09:r)

It's time for some honest talk, Peter.

I won my re-election in Florida on Election Day, but Republicans nationally lost one seat in the U.S. Senate. _However, Georgia is headed to overtime with a runoff election._

When you read this, **I want you to be able to hear the alarm in my words.** I am concerned. We must not let our chance to flip this last Senate seat slip through our fingers when we're so close to victory.

**We need Herschel Walker to win if we want to hold on to our 50/50 split in the Senate. Without Herschel in the Senate, Republicans will get steamrolled by Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden's disastrous agenda for America.**

subject: Warnock doesn’t want Biden in Georgia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter,

Just when I think I've seen it all, something new happens in the Georgia Senate runoff.

**Joe Biden campaigned yesterday for Raphael Warnock ... in BOSTON.**

The Warnock campaign is scared to be seen with President Biden on the same stage, so they sent him to NEW ENGLAND where he attended a phone bank at a union hall making calls to voters in GEORGIA.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62024033:Jc3tWEGqN:m:1:3346849603:DA5BBB2AFDFCE5664111C2381FD2FEE9:r)
**Not only did President Biden make calls into Georgia to get out the vote for Warnock, but he also helped Warnock raise MILLIONS of LIBERAL DOLLARS at a Boston fundraiser.**

Peter, yesterday I campaigned for Herschel IN GEORGIA (I know - a shocking concept). While I was there, I recorded a short video about the race after a quick lunch at Waffle House (a great Georgia-based company). **[Click here to watch the video:](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62024033:Jc3tWEGqN:m:1:3346849603:DA5BBB2AFDFCE5664111C2381FD2FEE9:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62024033:Jc3tWEGqN:m:1:3346849603:DA5BBB2AFDFCE5664111C2381FD2FEE9:r)
**Raphael Warnock votes with Joe Biden 96% of the time, but he doesn't want Georgians to know. Biden's policies are so unpopular in Georgia that Senator Warnock sent the President to campaign 1,000 miles away from Atlanta!**

Democrats are pouring money into Georgia from liberal states like Massachusetts and California because they know Raphael Warnock is a reliable vote for their radical agenda.

**[Don't let Massachusetts buy a 3rd senator. Please, help Herschel in the final hours of this race. Chip in.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62024033:Jc3tWEGqN:m:1:3346849603:DA5BBB2AFDFCE5664111C2381FD2FEE9:r)**

With the runoff election on Tuesday, IT'S NOW OR NEVER!

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62024033:Jc3tWEGqN:m:1:3346849603:DA5BBB2AFDFCE5664111C2381FD2FEE9:r)

Lindsey Graham

subject: I’m praying you see this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62024956:6rBQ7EG8N:m:1:3331703221:C2E25DA09CB7D977E1EDE7F2D7F210A0:r)

---
**Our fundraising has slowed down. If we're going to turn out voters in the final 24 hours of this runoff, we've got to crank things up. It's now or never.**
Peter,

The runoff election is less than 24 hours away.

We are trying to make every hour count, **but our fundraising numbers aren't where they should be.**

We always knew that Raphael Warnock would outraise us - even in the runoff, but the financial gap continues to grow.

**Senator Warnock has raised over $153 million and is on track to break all fundraising records in American history.**

We're in the turnout phase of the campaign, so missing a fundraising goal means that we don't have the money to invest in our ground game for the final hours of this runoff.

[** Help our Ground Game!
Chip in $25 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62024956:6rBQ7EG8N:m:1:3331703221:C2E25DA09CB7D977E1EDE7F2D7F210A0:r)
Peter, I know the number of emails and text messages we send can be annoying, but they are the backbone of our fundraising program. When you don't respond and we miss our fundraising goal, _our entire campaign suffers._

**If we don't properly fund our voter turnout operation, we're going to lose.**

**[I am counting on you to help make sure we have the funds we need to win this thing tomorrow! Please chip in to help our ground game.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62024956:6rBQ7EG8N:m:1:3331703221:C2E25DA09CB7D977E1EDE7F2D7F210A0:r)**

**It's now or never.**

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62024956:6rBQ7EG8N:m:1:3331703221:C2E25DA09CB7D977E1EDE7F2D7F210A0:r)

Herschel Walker

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: I was just on stage with President Obama
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend, President Obama and I recently stepped off the rally stage here in Georgia. It's an honor to have him by our side at this pivotal moment.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-warnock [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-warnock]
If you didn't get a chance to join our rally, here's what you need to know: tomorrow, we're going to win this runoff election and keep Georgia blue.
But here’s the thing: Republicans know this, and they’re afraid. We narrowly led Herschel Walker in the general election – so now the GOP is flooding this race with more than $58 million to help Walker take the lead in these final days.
They won’t hold back, and neither can we. That’s why I urgently need your support to help hit our critical goal before midnight tonight.
Friend, I’m asking: Will you please split $20 – or whatever you can between me and Serve America – so we can win in Georgia and expand our razor-thin Democratic Senate majority? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-warnock]
Thank you so much for all you do, friend.
– Rev. Raphael Warnock

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Waffle House [CLICK TO WATCH]
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter,

Just when I think I've seen it all, something new happens in the Georgia Senate runoff.

**Joe Biden campaigned yesterday for Raphael Warnock ... in BOSTON.**

The Warnock campaign is scared to be seen with President Biden on the same stage, so they sent him to NEW ENGLAND where he attended a phone bank at a union hall making calls to voters in GEORGIA.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62024062:6lIfcEGNM:m:1:3359512271:557359C250828C7CE7285CA7C3C9083B:r)
**Not only did President Biden make calls into Georgia to get out the vote for Warnock, but he also helped Warnock raise MILLIONS of LIBERAL DOLLARS at a Boston fundraiser.**

Peter, yesterday I campaigned for Herschel IN GEORGIA (I know - a shocking concept). While I was there, I recorded a short video about the race after a quick lunch at Waffle House (a great Georgia-based company). **[Click here to watch the video:](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62024062:6lIfcEGNM:m:1:3359512271:557359C250828C7CE7285CA7C3C9083B:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62024062:6lIfcEGNM:m:1:3359512271:557359C250828C7CE7285CA7C3C9083B:r)
**Raphael Warnock votes with Joe Biden 96% of the time, but he doesn't want Georgians to know. Biden's policies are so unpopular in Georgia that Senator Warnock sent the President to campaign 1,000 miles away from Atlanta!**

Democrats are pouring money into Georgia from liberal states like Massachusetts and California because they know Raphael Warnock is a reliable vote for their radical agenda.

**[Don't let Massachusetts buy a 3rd senator. Please, help Herschel in the final hours of this race. Chip in $25, $30, or even $34 for #34.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62024062:6lIfcEGNM:m:1:3359512271:557359C250828C7CE7285CA7C3C9083B:r)**

With the runoff election on Tuesday, IT'S NOW OR NEVER!

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62024062:6lIfcEGNM:m:1:3359512271:557359C250828C7CE7285CA7C3C9083B:r)

Lindsey Graham

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62024062:6lIfcEGNM:m:1:3359512271:557359C250828C7CE7285CA7C3C9083B:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62024063:6lIfcEGNM:m:1:3359512271:557359C250828C7CE7285CA7C3C9083B:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62024064:6lIfcEGNM:m:1:3359512271:557359C250828C7CE7285CA7C3C9083B:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62024065:6lIfcEGNM:m:1:3359512271:557359C250828C7CE7285CA7C3C9083B:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62024066:6lIfcEGNM:m:1:3359512271:557359C250828C7CE7285CA7C3C9083B:r)

---

Tomorrow is the Georgia runoff.

This is our __**LAST**__ chance to win **BIG** in 2022 and strike a major blow to the Democrats.

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62025198:6_KqcEGpN:m:1:3331421248:08D79F218CA82EF831D2D29929AC8CB2:r)
---

**I won 't lie to you: Going into tomorrow, _Herschel Walker is the underdog._** After an onslaught of negative advertising and slanderous lies from the Mainstream Media, he's trailing in the polls.

But as we've seen time and time again, the polls aren't always right. The only thing that really matters is what happens on Election Day.

That's why I'm calling on __**YOU**__ to _**[rush an emergency donation to Herschel ASAP.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62025198:6_KqcEGpN:m:1:3331421248:08D79F218CA82EF831D2D29929AC8CB2:r "rush an emergency
donation to Herschel ASAP.")**_ The last minute support will help Herschel fund his Election Day program and ensure our voters get to the polls!

---
| | [PUSH HERSCHEL TO VICTORY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62025198:6_KqcEGpN:m:1:3331421248:08D79F218CA82EF831D2D29929AC8CB2:r)
---

The stakes couldn't be higher - **if Herschel doesn 't win, the Democrats will be able to end the filibuster and pack our courts with radical Left judges.**

Please don't let me down - I expect to see your name on the list of patriots who did their part and helped Herschel by the end of the day.

Unapologetically American,

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62025198:6_KqcEGpN:m:1:3331421248:08D79F218CA82EF831D2D29929AC8CB2:r)

body:
|
---
Peter,

We only have one day until the runoff election TOMORROW against Raphael Warnock.

Despite being on track to become **the top Senate fundraiser IN AMERICAN HISTORY, Senator Warnock still cannot pull ahead of our grassroots campaign. He's raised over $153 million and lobbed vicious and FALSE attacks against me, but he's stuck below 50%. **

_**This is bad news for any incumbent, Peter.**_

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62023798:6ZA9JEGNq:m:1:3331421248:41CFA4E609C8E8F0B3827AE46367C010:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62023798:6ZA9JEGNq:m:1:3331421248:41CFA4E609C8E8F0B3827AE46367C010:r)
[** BREAK THE TIE >>> CHIP IN $10 **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62023798:6ZA9JEGNq:m:1:3331421248:41CFA4E609C8E8F0B3827AE46367C010:r)
**Polling - including our own internal data - shows we're TIED.**

_The only way to break this tie and win tomorrow is with a massive ground game._

Raphael Warnock just got a boost from Joe Biden, Barack Obama, and Hollywood celebrities, but I'm looking for support from YOU. **[Will you step up in these final hours of this runoff, dig deep, and chip in to boost our turnout efforts to FLIP GEORGIA RED?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62023798:6ZA9JEGNq:m:1:3331421248:41CFA4E609C8E8F0B3827AE46367C010:r)**

If the Democrats win a 51-seat Senate majority, they can push through every single radical plan they have. **[We cannot win without your immediate support.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62023798:6ZA9JEGNq:m:1:3331421248:41CFA4E609C8E8F0B3827AE46367C010:r)**

_**I'm like Ricky Bobby in the movie "Talladega Nights." I don't come to lose.**_

So, Peter, I am personally asking for your help. **[Will you stand with me?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62023798:6ZA9JEGNq:m:1:3331421248:41CFA4E609C8E8F0B3827AE46367C010:r)**

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62023798:6ZA9JEGNq:m:1:3331421248:41CFA4E609C8E8F0B3827AE46367C010:r)

Herschel Walker

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Just when I think I've seen it all...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter,

Just when I think I've seen it all, something new happens in the Georgia Senate runoff.

**Joe Biden campaigned yesterday for Raphael Warnock ... in BOSTON.**

The Warnock campaign is scared to be seen with President Biden on the same stage, so they sent him to NEW ENGLAND where he attended a phone bank at a union hall making calls to voters in GEORGIA.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62024103:Jc9baEGNJ:m:1:3360412034:176060E7E5CB2CF9521B7C3844E7820D:r)
**Not only did President Biden make calls into Georgia to get out the vote for Warnock, but he also helped Warnock raise MILLIONS of LIBERAL DOLLARS at a Boston fundraiser.**

Peter, yesterday I campaigned for Herschel IN GEORGIA (I know - a shocking concept). While I was there, I recorded a short video about the race after a quick lunch at Waffle House (a great Georgia-based company). **[Click here to watch the video:](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62024103:Jc9baEGNJ:m:1:3360412034:176060E7E5CB2CF9521B7C3844E7820D:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62024103:Jc9baEGNJ:m:1:3360412034:176060E7E5CB2CF9521B7C3844E7820D:r)
**Raphael Warnock votes with Joe Biden 96% of the time, but he doesn't want Georgians to know. Biden's policies are so unpopular in Georgia that Senator Warnock sent the President to campaign 1,000 miles away from Atlanta!**

Democrats are pouring money into Georgia from liberal states like Massachusetts and California because they know Raphael Warnock is a reliable vote for their radical agenda.

**[Don't let Massachusetts buy a 3rd senator. Please, help Herschel in the final hours of this race. Chip in.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62024103:Jc9baEGNJ:m:1:3360412034:176060E7E5CB2CF9521B7C3844E7820D:r)**

With the runoff election on Tuesday, IT'S NOW OR NEVER!

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62024103:Jc9baEGNJ:m:1:3360412034:176060E7E5CB2CF9521B7C3844E7820D:r)

Lindsey Graham

clean_body: | Peter, Just when I think I've seen it all, something new happens in the Georgia Senate runoff. Joe Biden campaigned yesterday for Raphael Warnock ... in BOSTON. The Warnock campaign is scared to be seen with President Biden on the same stage, so they sent him to NEW ENGLAND where he attended a phone bank at a union hall making calls to voters in GEORGIA. Not only did President Biden make calls into Georgia to get out the vote for Warnock, but he also helped Warnock raise MILLIONS of LIBERAL DOLLARS at a Boston fundraiser. Peter, yesterday I campaigned for Herschel IN GEORGIA (I know - a shocking concept). While I was there, I recorded a short video about the race after a quick lunch at Waffle House (a great Georgia-based company). Raphael Warnock votes with Joe Biden 96% of the time, but he doesn't want Georgians to know. Biden's policies are so unpopular in Georgia that Senator Warnock sent the President to campaign 1,000 miles away from Atlanta! Democrats are pouring money into Georgia from liberal states like Massachusetts and California because they know Raphael Warnock is a reliable vote for their radical agenda. With the runoff election on Tuesday, IT'S NOW OR NEVER! Thanks, Lindsey Graham | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. name: National Rifle Association
subject: The Second Amendment is at risk in Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Rifle Association of America
body:
Help us defend our freedoms | The eyes of our nation are on Georgia. Every seat in the Senate is of critical importance...
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62026256:64GGaEG8N:m:1:3253819041:ABA0130C8BF9042F0763DEBAF8799D09:r)

Peter,

**The eyes of our nation are on Georgia.**

Every seat in the Senate is of critical importance; the fate of the Second Amendment could come down to _just one vote._

We all know what Joe Biden and his Democrat cronies will do if they go unchecked. **They won't stop until every lawfully owned firearm is banned, registered, confiscated, and destroyed.** With everyone's attention on Georgia, we need to do everything in our power to help **save the Second Amendment** for the great people of that state. _That's why we're calling on you, Peter, to chip in TODAY._

Let's be clear: **We NEED to save the Second Amendment from gun grabber Joe Biden and his Senate puppets.** There's simply no other way to put it.
**[SAVE THE SECOND AMENDMENT»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62026256:64GGaEG8N:m:1:3253819041:ABA0130C8BF9042F0763DEBAF8799D09:r)**
_Democrats have been raising historic amounts of money to prop up their anti-gun agenda, and we need to match their efforts. The NRA is committed to fighting for YOU to preserve your constitutional right to bear arms. But we can't do it alone._

_**That's why we need YOU, Peter, to chip in TODAY to bolster our efforts during these difficult times.**_

**[Please contribute ANY AMOUNT TODAY to stand up to the Biden Democrats and DEFEND YOUR FREEDOMS.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62026256:64GGaEG8N:m:1:3253819041:ABA0130C8BF9042F0763DEBAF8799D09:r)**

**[DONOR FILE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62026256:64GGaEG8N:m:1:3253819041:ABA0130C8BF9042F0763DEBAF8799D09:r)**
**SUPPORTER:****Peter**
**CONTRIBUTION STATUS:****PENDING**
**DEADLINE: IMMEDIATELY**

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62026256:64GGaEG8N:m:1:3253819041:ABA0130C8BF9042F0763DEBAF8799D09:r)**

For over 150 years, the NRA has been **America's strongest advocate** for our sacred right to keep and bear arms. We've made immeasurable progress in our fight, but with Joe Biden in the White House, our most trying days are still ahead. _That's why we NEED to band together NOW and fight back against the Left's insane agenda._

_We must unite as one movement to save the Second Amendment. You are an imperative part of this, Peter._ _**We need all hands on deck.**_

**[Please contribute ANY AMOUNT TODAY to help us fight to preserve our freedoms.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62026256:64GGaEG8N:m:1:3253819041:ABA0130C8BF9042F0763DEBAF8799D09:r)**

Thank you,

The National Rifle Association

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: CTA Dec. 5th: MUST-WIN SENATE RUNOFF GOTV
body:
| | | |
---
---
While the Democrats retained control of the Senate, if Republicans do not win this Georgia runoff, there will be no holding them back from radical judicial appointments. Right now, with a 50-50 Senate, Joe Manchin can sometimes be persuaded to hold the line. He is also up for reelection in the next cycle, so he has even more reason to push back on his radical party. However, if Democrats win the Georgia runoff, they won’t need Joe Manchin’s vote, and can approve the most extreme, left-wing judges we’ve ever seen.
---
| | [](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
**You can help stop this from happening by using our Get Out The Vote texting program, right from your own home and cell phone.** **Election Day is TOMORROW, December 6th. Please do everything you can to help Walker win the Georgia runoff!** If you want to help, please take a few minutes to text Georgia voters and ask them to vote. That's it! All you have to do to begin, is go to [**tpp.me/textvoters**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIzMzktMzYyNzU0YWZmM2UxNDZkNWEzMzJjMGUwNTgyNjNkYjkiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vdHBwLm1lL3RleHR2b3RlcnM_bWlkPTQ2MTYyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/EJVFIn9Hxf3YMkesvUy3Cg) and register. You will be asked for your cell phone number, your name, and your email address. Then just click on the button that says “Start Texting!”
---

subject: just $5

body:

**$5** – that's how much I'm asking you to donate today, friend.
Your $5 could help me beat the odds (again), keep Georgia blue, and expand our Senate majority. And your support has never been more urgent.
Right now, I’m running neck and neck with my opponent, Herschel Walker. With one day until the runoff election, we need all hands on deck to power our campaign through the final stretch.
**I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I mean it when I say your $5 could mean the difference between winning and losing this race. Please, friend: Will you split $5 now between me and Kirsten Gillibrand to fuel our people-powered movement to victory here in Georgia?**

But here’s the thing: Republicans know this, and they’re afraid. We narrowly led Herschel Walker in the general election – so now the GOP is flooding this race with more than $58 million to help Walker take the lead in these final days.

They won’t hold back, and neither can we. That’s why I urgently need your support to help hit our critical Rally Day goal before midnight tonight.

Peter,
---
Our team on the ground in Georgia is fighting tooth and nail to ensure Herschel Walker wins this runoff.
---
And that hard work is paying off: **__A new poll shows Herschel now has a 1-POINT LEAD over radical liberal Raphael Warnock!__**
---
With election day TOMORROW, what we do in these final hours will no doubt be the difference between victory and defeat.
---
**[Please make one final grassroots contribution to help my good friend Herschel Walker WIN.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62026930:Jr2XaEGdN:m:1:3331703221:FB52065D04234AB8317AF32AF38A33E5:r)**

This runoff isn't _just_ about Georgia Peter, it's about ensuring we win the _1 final seat_ in the Senate to STOP Biden and Kamala from gaining their coveted **51-seat majority.**

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Arizona is a testing ground for Republican attacks on democracy. We must make sure GOP Attorney General candidate Abe Hamadeh isn't able to prevail in the Arizona statewide recount about to begin, where he currently trails Democratic Attorney General-elect Kris Hayes.
body:
recount update
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb383fd67-e531-4019-936b-7349542392f8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | **_There is one more Big Lie supporting, anti-democracy election denier left whom we must stop._** We didn't only turn the red wave into a blue crush, but we defeated almost every one of the loudest election deniers running in 2022. [_**But, to finish the job, we must make sure GOP Attorney General candidate Abe Hamadeh isn't able to prevail in the Arizona statewide recount about to begin, where he currently trails Democratic Attorney General-elect Kris Hayes. This is why your support for the Democratic Attorneys General Association is critical at this time.**_](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8e8c31d4-dc51-462a-8fb1-fce8f3bbd81c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Arizona has been ground zero for Republican attacks on democracy. Kari Lake not only refuses to concede, but still spits out lie after lie about "election fraud" that doesn't exist. **Ruby-red Cochise County, AZ had to be sued by current Secretary of State and Governor-elect Katie Hobbs to force them to submit their vote tallies, as they denied a fair election took place by presenting zero evidence and a whole lot of conspiracies.** A second county, Mohave, also initially refused, until the threat of arrest forced the Republican commissioners to back down. _ __And, of course, Hamadeh himself is spewing every conspiracy theory he can conjure up, damaging the faith Arizonans, and all Americans, have in our democratic process._ __So we must be ready for Hamadeh's team to pull out every trick, including trying to alter and/or destroy ballots, engage in ridiculous lawsuits, propaganda and even intimidation--anything they can think of, legal or otherwise--to try and wrest the election away from the 99% certain winner after a legitimate recount, Kris Mayes._
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE: No election deniers for attorney general**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T32ef7ab7-09ff-4d76-8171-cbb8254093a2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | _We can't make Hamadeh have an ounce of class or respect for the Democratic process and shut his mouth. But we can make sure he isn't able to find a way to illegally or unethically win this election, so he can spout this trash while serving as the highest ranking law enforcement office in Arizona._ [**_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to the Democratic Attorneys General Association (DAGA) so they can use these resources to make sure there is a fully aboveboard recount and the legitimate winner--Kris Mayes--ascends to the position of Arizona Attorney General?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7d5d8bb7-3a17-4b15-b6ae-2d741b32654c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) We know fighting these ghouls is exhausting, and **so appreciate** your standing with Blue Amp Action in this fight. Thanks!
---
Cliff
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9a175bcb-7255-4a2e-ba9d-91dbc95ca74d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

We know fighting these ghouls is exhausting, and so appreciate your standing with Blue Amp Action in this fight. Thanks! Cliff | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

subject: Peter, I’m not sure what we’re going to do
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|

**Our fundraising has slowed down. If we're going to turn out voters in the final 24 hours of this runoff, we've got to crank things up. It's now or never.**
Peter,

The runoff election is less than 24 hours away.

We are trying to make every hour count, **but our fundraising numbers aren't where they should be.**

We always knew that Raphael Warnock would outraise us - even in the runoff, but the financial gap continues to grow.

**Senator Warnock has raised over $153 million and is on track to break all fundraising records in American history.**

We're in the turnout phase of the campaign, so missing a fundraising goal means that we don't have the money to invest in our ground game for the final hours of this runoff.

[** Help our Ground Game!
Chip in $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62025210:6LkFaEGNU:m:1:3317145305:2A5E85923AA86B161D810DE6584F9673:r)
Peter, I know the number of emails and text messages we send can be annoying, but they are the backbone of our fundraising program. When you don't respond and we miss our fundraising goal, _our entire campaign suffers._

**If we don't properly fund our voter turnout operation, we're going to lose.**

**[I am counting on you to help make sure we have the funds we need to win this thing tomorrow! Please chip in to help our ground game.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62025210:6LkFaEGNU:m:1:3317145305:2A5E85923AA86B161D810DE6584F9673:r)**

**It's now or never.**

Thanks,

Herschel Walker

name: Herschel
subject: I’m praying you see this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I have some bad news.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z4i2683i75fg68a906qt7t6m5or0eqp58s5nkb30_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sjj6qrrcptmckrjddr3eoojac72c8pm5cdj61g6ec3jcpgnadj1m9ir8tb0smoefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj32tpjc5g74dj662pb6or7m2qmash1k8gn48n24hhmeo32clhm8pj3c8iv0)
|
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zo2osq481sh1pk8h3297icoddo9lf93458lncdpg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9im6p36cdh2bs)
---
**Our fundraising has slowed down. If we 're going to turn out voters in the final 24 hours of this runoff, we've got to crank things up. It's now or never.**
Fellow American,

The runoff election is less than 24 hours away.

We are trying to make every hour count, **but our fundraising numbers aren 't where they should be. **

We always knew that Raphael Warnock would outraise us - even in the runoff, but the financial gap continues to grow.

**Senator Warnock has raised over $153 million and is on track to break all fundraising records in American history.**

We're in the turnout phase of the campaign, so missing a fundraising goal means that we don't have the money to invest in our ground game for the final hours of this runoff.
[** Help our Ground Game!
Chip in $5 -> **](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zgh2cl0au9edj90tp50trjq4u8n933sfke0kptpg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9im6p36cdh2bs)
Fellow American, I know the number of emails and text messages we send can be annoying, but they are the backbone of our fundraising program. When you don't respond and we miss our fundraising goal, _our entire campaign suffers._

**If we don 't properly fund our voter turnout operation, we're going to lose.**

**[I am counting on you to help make sure we have the funds we need to win this thing tomorrow! Please chip in $5 or more to help our ground game.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zg0rl3879j2grg58vgio3gi7mbbk6mvs83o2gss0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9im6p36cdh2bs)**

**It 's now or never.**

Thanks,

[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zql49fg5t3qnca2m1n28fpp7d3grbo0g5nst6cn8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9im6p36cdh2bs)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zqg9td4rd6jqu19hnru7oanjphjv11rqr1ftqico_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9im6p36cdh2bs)

[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z4i4mu8vdse8kokofdf7upc19q6enckdfv62n2q8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9im6p36cdh2bs) [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zmjfmk9vbps1rg0ek21p1b1dnaopfk4ihp2415m0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9im6p36cdh2bs) [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zcm3502roqbqrqdufb1g2l44henktrib7kuc1sp0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9im6p36cdh2bs) [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zdr0uar9qm8kluadobueenar196g30f35nqnqaog_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9im6p36cdh2bs)

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Why the 51st Democratic seat matters so much
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=YNbsMt4OnXJPwaEws3PxusNJM2OGxv2h&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend, I am so incredibly grateful for you and this entire grassroots team. Together, we protected our must-win seat here in Connecticut and ensured Democrats maintained control of the Senate.
But this election season isn't over yet: To secure our 51st Democratic vote in the Senate - and with it, a true _majority_ - we must win Georgia's runoff election and re-elect Sen. Raphael Warnock on Dec. 6.
While control of the Senate is not fully up for grabs in this race, winning another Democratic seat so we can move beyond a 50-50 split chamber would have an enormous impact on our ability to get things done. Right now in the Judiciary Committee, for example, membership is split equally, meaning Republicans only need to vote together to stifle or slow down President Biden's judicial nominations.
But if we win in Georgia and get an outright Democratic majority, we could put a stop to GOP obstruction on committees. We would be able to confirm _more_ judges at a _quicker_ pace - which is particularly important if we want to rebalance the federal bench after years of Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell's jamming through unqualified, extremist, and anti-reproductive rights ideologues.
**But at the drop of a hat, Mitch McConnell 's super PAC funneled more than $8 million into Georgia - and now a new poll shows Sen. Warnock tied 50-50 with the GOP's Trump-backed candidate, Herschel Walker. **
That's why I'm coming to you and this team. You know what it takes to protect Senate control and fight GOP megadonors. You've done it before. Now, Sen. Warnock needs our help. I said I'd help him raise $10,000 before 11:59 p.m. tonight to fight McConnell's attacks and keep Georgia blue. **Will I see your name on the list of donors who won us the 51st vote in the Senate?**
**[Please, split a donation between my campaign and Sen. Raphael Warnock's so we can defeat Trump and McConnell's candidate in Georgia and expand Democratic control of the Senate.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rb4rw?refcode=jtk1299-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
Thank you,
Dick
[ Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rb4rw?refcode=jtk1299-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Hfhi8iq7%2BSQ%2B%2BxlOsxkdTMNJM2OGxv2h&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

Peter,

After losing control of the House of Representatives, every liberal in the country has their eyes on Georgia. They are terrified of Democrat Raphael Warnock losing to Herschel Walker.

Because they know Herschel Walker will be a strong voice in the Senate to:

\- Cuts taxes
\- Stop the Left's reckless spending sprees
\- Secure our border
\- Stand for law and order
\- Defend our Constitution

This is it. Herschel's final stand. Our last chance to get him across the finish line and get our country back on track.

Peter,

**I'll be blunt: when I look at Georgia, I am worried.**

I'm worried because Raphael Warnock is on the verge of getting re-elected if we don't have Herschel Walker's back on December 6.

**We cannot afford to let the Left win another seat in the U.S. Senate.**

Raphael Warnock votes with Joe Biden 96% of the time. From crippling inflationary policies to woke ideology in the classroom and inept foreign policy abroad, their plan is taking us down the wrong path.

If we don't turn things around soon, the United States of America will no longer be the Shining City on a Hill.

We cannot afford to sit on the sidelines. If we all wait for somebody else to step up, Herschel will lose due to a lack of resources - _plain and simple._

If you want to help flip the FINAL Senate race of the year from BLUE to RED, then stop what you're doing and make an immediate contribution RIGHT NOW. 100% of your contribution will go directly to Herschel Walker's Senate campaign to help him WIN on December 6.

body:
Statehouse Republicans want to make it more difficult for Ohioans to have their voice heard at the polls
| | | **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55563534/382109864/1725876162?refcode=em22_221205_antivo_fndd_gq_act___ODP_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221205_antivo_fndd_gq_act___ODP_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjE0MDAzZS1iZTc0LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EVePQ4dH_cgWlmrAUrA3Boshzidu1FarWhCgQDKw0cM=)** ****Ohio lawmakers move to change election laws, voter ID requirements****
"House Bill 294 would also allow election officials to set up three ballot drop boxes at one location in the county, which advocates worry could limit access for voters in both urban and rural areas. It also lets Ohioans request an absentee ballot online and eliminates in-person early voting the Monday before Election Day, redistributing those hours to other days."
---
Republicans at the statehouse want to come after our right to vote, team.

Ohio already has extreme voter laws that disenfranchise thousands of voters – especially low-income Ohioans, the elderly, and people of color.

Now, Republicans at the statehouse want to take it a step further by passing HB 294, a disgusting anti-voter bill that would make it more difficult for Ohioans to have their voice heard at the polls: limit drop boxes, restrict absentee voting, cut early voting, and more.

Looking ahead to 2024 and beyond, Ohio Democrats are focused on protecting the right to vote. We all must work together to fight against any future anti-voter attacks that Ohio Republicans launch.

clean_body: Statehouse Republicans want to make it more difficult for Ohioans to have their voice heard at the polls | | | = **Ohio lawmakers move to change election laws, voter ID requirements "House Bill 294 would also allow election officials to set up three ballot drop boxes at one location in the county, which advocates worry could limit access for voters in both urban and rural areas. It also lets Ohioans request an absentee ballot online and eliminates in-person early voting the Monday before Election Day, redistributing those hours to other days." Republicans at the statehouse want to come after our right to vote, team. Ohio already has extreme voter laws that disenfranchise thousands of voters – especially low-income Ohioans, the elderly, and people of color. Now, Republicans at the statehouse want to take it a step further by passing HB 294, a disgusting anti-voter bill that would make it more difficult for Ohioans to have their voice heard at the polls: limit drop boxes, restrict absentee voting, cut early voting, and more. Looking ahead to 2024 and beyond, Ohio Democrats are focused on protecting the right to vote. We all must work together to fight against any future anti-voter attacks that Ohio Republicans launch. ** Thank you, The Ohio Democratic Party The Ohio Democratic Party is working year-round to elect Democrats who will fight for working families all over the Buckeye State. We have the chance to flip not only Ohio's open U.S. Senate seat, but to elect a Democratic governor as well. Will you pitch in $10 or more right away? Every dollar you give helps build a blue Ohio. = | 697 East Broad Street Suite 101 Columbus, Ohio 43215 | Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | Click here to from the Ohio Democratic Party's email list.

name: Marco Rubio
subject: The Dems were able to stop our Red Wave this year.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
|
---
| | | I just want to start off by saying - I'm so sorry.

I hate that I have to drop into your inbox like this, but I'm humbly asking you to read this all the way through. If you get to the end and still think your $25 doesn't matter, then you may end up paying more at the pump, in the grocery store checkout, and on Tax Day.

The Democrats were able to stop our Red Wave this year. That means how we respond in these next few weeks could alter the trajectory of our country. **I can't stress this enough, but what you do in the next 2 minutes could help Republicans take back control of our country.** That means we have two options:
1\. Let Democrats continue to have control of the White House and the Senate.

**2\. We can start working like a team to stop the Democrats from running our country into the ground.**
I'm sure you've gotten a lot of messages recently, but this is CRITICAL. Having a slow start means the Democrats continue to have unchecked power over your life. These are _REAL_ goals and _REAL_ deadlines we need to meet. **[I'm humbly asking you to chip in to help kick start Republican efforts to take back power and join the team that gets America back on track.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62027456:6WIJzEGNK:m:1:3253819041:933FC9A32A11F6BD600C489B06D8EDB9:r "I'm humbly asking you to chip in $13 to help kick start Republican efforts to take back power
and join the team that gets America back on track.")**

Thank you for taking the time to read this,
Marco Rubio

A Personal Note from Marco Rubio:

My parents came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba into a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to get to work to achieve the American Dream.

**I will never stop fighting for the American Dream because to me, it 's personal.** However, the American Dream that allowed the son of a bartender and a maid to become a U.S. Senator is slipping further and further out of reach and I need help to make sure we can restore it.

**[Join my fight to restore the American Dream:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62027457:6WIJzEGNK:m:1:3253819041:933FC9A32A11F6BD600C489B06D8EDB9:r "Join my fight
to restore the American Dream:")**

DREAM")

We need you to stop what you're doing immediately and take this seriously. **What you choose to do in the next 30 seconds could determine the future of our country.**

The fate of our country is currently hanging on by a thread. Now you have two choices and you decide what happens next:

1\. Ignore this message and let the Democrats continue to divide America and turn us against each other.

**2\. We can work like a team to make sure America 's best days are ahead of us. **

The choice is not between Republicans or Democrats. The choice isn't between Left or Right. _The choice is between commonsense values and radical lunacy._

**[If you're committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62027458:6WIJzEGNK:m:1:3253819041:933FC9A32A11F6BD600C489B06D8EDB9:r "If you’re

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: Will D.C. jail kill this Jan.6 peaceful protester?
body:
Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it grew aggressively into stage 3 cancer over eight months, because the D.C. jail doctors REFUSED to let him take his medications...and REFUSED to let him see an oncologist! [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0137%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=nrtzdVU4waZg7nMyobPLkw&sysid=1)
Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it grew aggressively into stage 3 cancer over eight months, because the D.C. jail doctors REFUSED to let him take his medications...and REFUSED to let him see an oncologist! | | | [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42775%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KdH%2b3ysI53kXc9Oqd0p4Kw&sysid=1)
---
| | |
---
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42776%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5Yz%2bues2oIVIvW31HL6JuA&sysid=1) Hi Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42777%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rikA71ejv6artQjdVFowNQ&sysid=1)

Peaceful Protester Christopher Worrell committed no crimes on January 6th. He simply exercised his First Amendment right to free speech, along with thousands of other patriots outside the Capitol building.

But he was arrested anyway and thrown into the infamous D.C. jail that’s torturing and abusing patriots as I write you this urgent email.

**Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it grew aggressively into stage 3 cancer over eight months, because the D.C. jail doctors REFUSED to let him take his medications ...and REFUSED to let him see an oncologist!**

The abuse Christopher endured was so bad, that a federal judge finally ordered him to be released from jail based on an investigation by the U.S. Marshals.

Christopher is back home now, but he’s been in and out of the hospital. He’s in very bad shape, even after five rounds of chemotherapy.

Christopher’s fiancee, Trish, went public about the outrageous violation of his human rights on Tucker Carlson’s show recently.

**And when Tucker asked her if any politicians were coming to their aid, Trish said, “They’re ignoring us.”**

So, the D.C. jail is torturing and abusing peaceful protesters...blocking lifesaving medical care...and no one on Capitol Hill is helping them!

**If the Department of Justice and the D.C. jail can persecute and destroy the health of a peaceful protester for simply speaking up outside the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42778%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZQxd6jH32pDNFJe%2b4qqNLA&sysid=1)

**I’m fighting for the January 6 Peaceful Protesters, while so many others are just talking.**

[**So please give what you can right away.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42779%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2ZUjsQPHDx%2fBZ20neMrhQA&sysid=1)

Thank you!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, what the Biden Department of Justice, aka Biden “Gestapo,” and the D.C. jail “gulag” did to Christopher Worrell is pure evil.** He’s an innocent American who simply spoke up for our threatened freedoms outside of the Capitol building on January 6th.

[**Please dig deep and give a vital $25, $50, $100 or more right away to help fuel all of my critically important fights on behalf of the January 6 peaceful protesters.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42770%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=S29EepV1EZ5Vl5Qjkr2tFQ&sysid=1)

---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0137%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=nrtzdVU4waZg7nMyobPLkw&sysid=1)_

name: Herschel
subject: Our fundraising has slowed
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I have some bad news.
|
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zaqq4vcgm37kddml9g1rr3th9ml5mor4kg53m9no_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9hm0pb4clh2bs)

---
**Our fundraising has slowed down. If we're going to turn out voters in the final 24 hours of this runoff, we've got to crank things up. It's now or never.**
Fellow American,

The runoff election is less than 24 hours away.

We are trying to make every hour count, **but our fundraising numbers aren't where they should be.**

We always knew that Raphael Warnock would outraise us - even in the runoff, but the financial gap continues to grow.

**Senator Warnock has raised over $153 million and is on track to break all fundraising records in American history.**

We're in the turnout phase of the campaign, so missing a fundraising goal means that we don't have the money to invest in our ground game for the final hours of this runoff.

[** Help our Ground Game!
Chip in $5 -> **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrgruv7e6kp40m80el9k8nfm96aunie9v9tbrdm8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9hm0pb4clh2bs)
Fellow American, I know the number of emails and text messages we send can be annoying, but they are the backbone of our fundraising program. When you don't respond and we miss our fundraising goal, _our entire campaign suffers._

**If we don't properly fund our voter turnout operation, we're going to lose.**

**[I am counting on you to help make sure we have the funds we need to win this thing tomorrow! Please chip in $5 or more to help our ground game.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztlocc747h9efe4npcjdh5qn8ifqsafsa05qddk0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9hm0pb4clh2bs)**

**It's now or never.**

Thanks,

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z47kcu8e8cvsheeos583vel5cukouub5p42hdqr0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9hm0pb4clh2bs)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z835a2et6ur2ur4fbg17mmdsjg23aut4l7hf7ho8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9hm0pb4clh2bs)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Deadlocked
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
The latest polling show we’re tied. Here’s how we will win >> |
---
Fellow American,

We only have one day until the runoff election on Tuesday against Raphael Warnock.

Despite being on track to become **the top Senate fundraiser IN AMERICAN HISTORY, Senator Warnock still cannot pull ahead of our grassroots campaign. He's raised over $153 million and lobbed vicious and FALSE attacks against me, but he's stuck below 50%. **

Peter,

name: Senator Marco Rubio
subject: This isn’t over
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62027882:6V82nEGQN:m:1:3317145305:B4CCB7A8FD05D9922753F2986212EB08:r)

It's time for some honest talk, Peter.

I won my re-election in Florida on Election Day, but Republicans nationally lost one seat in the U.S. Senate. _However, Georgia is headed to overtime with a runoff election._

When you read this, **I want you to be able to hear the alarm in my words.** I am concerned. We must not let our chance to flip this last Senate seat slip through our fingers when we're so close to victory.

**We need Herschel Walker to win if we want to hold on to our 50/50 split in the Senate. Without Herschel in the Senate, Republicans will get steamrolled by Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden's disastrous agenda for America.**

I'm asking you to _dig deep_. **Every other Senate race has now been decided, and whether we win in Georgia is going to come down to whether we can get our voters to the polls once again on December 6th.**

I've pledged to do anything I can for Herschel and his team, which is why I'm reaching out to you right now. **[Is flipping this seat from BLUE to RED worth any amount to you?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62027882:6V82nEGQN:m:1:3317145305:B4CCB7A8FD05D9922753F2986212EB08:r)**

**Republicans have one final chance to show Americans that we can win tough races and get America back on track.** Herschel can only win in Georgia if he has the resources to fund his campaign for the next 24 hours.

[** HELP HERSCHEL FLIP THIS SEAT ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62027882:6V82nEGQN:m:1:3317145305:B4CCB7A8FD05D9922753F2986212EB08:r)
**[If you invest in just one thing for the rest of this year, there's no better choice than investing directly in Herschel Walker's campaign. He can win his runoff on December 6th- but only with your help, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62027882:6V82nEGQN:m:1:3317145305:B4CCB7A8FD05D9922753F2986212EB08:r)**

I know political emails can be pesky, but they serve an important purpose. Without your immediate help, I'm afraid we're going to blow a golden opportunity.

From the bottom of my heart, I'm asking you to get involved before it's too late. **[Send Herschel whatever you can right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62027882:6V82nEGQN:m:1:3317145305:B4CCB7A8FD05D9922753F2986212EB08:r)**

Thank you,

Marco Rubio
United States Senator

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62027882:6V82nEGQN:m:1:3317145305:B4CCB7A8FD05D9922753F2986212EB08:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62027883:6V82nEGQN:m:1:3317145305:B4CCB7A8FD05D9922753F2986212EB08:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62027884:6V82nEGQN:m:1:3317145305:B4CCB7A8FD05D9922753F2986212EB08:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62027885:6V82nEGQN:m:1:3317145305:B4CCB7A8FD05D9922753F2986212EB08:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62027886:6V82nEGQN:m:1:3317145305:B4CCB7A8FD05D9922753F2986212EB08:r)
