name: A.G. Holder
subject: Moore v. Harper
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
This SCOTUS decision could cause ripple effects to our democracy
|
---

The Supreme Court is about to hear a case that has big implications not only for our fight for fair maps, but also for our system of checks and balances -- _Moore v. Harper_.

Last year, voters in North Carolina overturned a gerrymandered congressional map in state court. Now they're headed to the Supreme Court to defend the fair map and stop extremist Republicans in their state from reinstating the gerrymandered map.

**[Friend -- If the thought of Republican legislatures operating without the check of a state court concerns you, we could use your support. Sign our petition if you think SCOTUS should protect our system of checks and balances.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55594836/382151062/-1462679232?source=20221205_AOTL_P_EHH_A1_ActivesxDonors&refcode=20221205_AOTL_P_EHH_A1_ActivesxDonors&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUwNmI5OGRkLWUxNzQtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=l3ODEQp-dCTCRCMzPEmRNIIbi-Z0bu9M_kyJLE3Gk7g=&emci=5ed4e8ff-c774-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=506b98dd-e174-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=8431045)**
[SIGN ON](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55594837/382151082/-1462679232?source=20221205_AOTL_P_EHH_A1_ActivesxDonors&refcode=20221205_AOTL_P_EHH_A1_ActivesxDonors&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUwNmI5OGRkLWUxNzQtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=l3ODEQp-dCTCRCMzPEmRNIIbi-Z0bu9M_kyJLE3Gk7g=&emci=5ed4e8ff-c774-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=506b98dd-e174-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=8431045)
---
North Carolina’s extreme Republicans turned to the “independent state legislature” theory -- a fringe legal theory claiming that state legislatures have **exclusive** power to regulate federal elections.

When those extreme Republicans argue their case in front of the Supreme Court this week, they will be asking SCOTUS to dismantle state-level judicial review of state legislation impacting federal elections -- effectively preventing state courts from providing checks and balances as needed to protect voters’ rights and the electoral process.

**[Add your name if you think the Supreme Court should protect checks and balances when deciding _Moore v. Harper_.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55594838/382151083/-1462679232?source=20221205_AOTL_P_EHH_A1_ActivesxDonors&refcode=20221205_AOTL_P_EHH_A1_ActivesxDonors&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUwNmI5OGRkLWUxNzQtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=l3ODEQp-dCTCRCMzPEmRNIIbi-Z0bu9M_kyJLE3Gk7g=&emci=5ed4e8ff-c774-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=506b98dd-e174-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=8431045)**
If the Supreme Court sides with the extreme Republicans pursuing this case, the fair North Carolina map will be replaced with the gerrymandered one already determined to violate the North Carolina Constitution. But this SCOTUS decision could also cause ripple effects to our democracy beyond this one map.

We’ve seen extreme Republicans go to great lengths to manipulate maps and overturn election results. Now they are asking the Supreme Court to give unchecked power to state legislatures -- including those that remain heavily gerrymandered.

**Let’s call this what it is: a desperate and reckless attempt to dismantle the accountability that prevented extreme, power-hungry politicians from successfully manipulating maps in the first place.**

We won’t know what the justices decide until next spring, but we need to be prepared for any outcome. This case has the potential to completely change the landscape of our federal elections.

I hope I can count on your support,

A.G. Holder

When those extreme Republicans argue their case in front of the Supreme Court this week, they will be asking SCOTUS to dismantle state-level judicial review of state legislation impacting federal elections -- effectively preventing state courts from providing checks and balances as needed to protect voters’ rights and the electoral process. If the Supreme Court sides with the extreme Republicans pursuing this case, the fair North Carolina map will be replaced with the gerrymandered one already determined to violate the North Carolina Constitution. But this SCOTUS decision could also cause ripple effects to our democracy beyond this one map. We’ve seen extreme Republicans go to great lengths to manipulate maps and overturn election results. Now they are asking the Supreme Court to give unchecked power to state legislatures -- including those that remain heavily gerrymandered. Let’s call this what it is: a desperate and reckless attempt to dismantle the accountability that prevented extreme, power-hungry politicians from successfully manipulating maps in the first place. We won’t know what the justices decide until next spring, but we need to be prepared for any outcome. This case has the potential to completely change the landscape of our federal elections. I hope I can count on your support, A.G. Holder All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. TextFAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. and | = | PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND. Contributions or gifts to The National Redistricting Action Fund are not tax deductible. 700 13th Street NW, Suite 600, Washington, D.C. 20005 This email was sent to:dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: American Briefing
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0a127uodssha4q531ei30rjtvovd51kjjg54ae8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9jm2o36c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zogbsd62914rp22g03tr8fv6n269jlu7f20iik58_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9jm2o36c3h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zkb22r4arvof8no2ql3nmm47qkq9i11uf2ag2h80_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9jm2o36c3h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbrnrrqdm5tm2l7045br8orkjsoub8bvs9k6g938_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9jm2o36c3h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Candidate Spotlight: Georgia Gov. Brian Kemp
body:
| | |
---
Friend,
---
Since first being elected governor in 2018, Gov. Brian Kemp has done so much good for the state of Georgia. Gov. Kemp kept Georgia open for business, cut taxes, and brought in new jobs. When families were struggling to pay sky-high prices at the pump, he suspended the state’s gas tax. To help keep Georgians safe, he signed legislation banning local governments from defunding the police. When he wanted to strengthen election integrity, he signed legislation to protect our elections and expand voter ID.
---
| | I was proud to endorse Brian Kemp earlier this year because he has a proven track record of strengthening Georgia and fighting for conservative solutions. I knew his race would be tough, and he needed everyone on his side to defeat Stacey Abrams.
---
|
---
| | In the end, Stacey Abrams put up a fight, but Georgians sent a message loud and clear on Election Day: Brian Kemp is an invaluable leader. He’s been a fantastic leader for the state, and I know he’ll continue to do great things for Georgia in his next term. My very best,
---
---
Nikki Haley
---
|
---
[](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=3ab8e1cd463749c5ae6dc250e5cae6d2&_e=lejv7SxGKL_S8i6LAhUT6D8sW7Il23hoMK2UV0TsykgCWJBcxeNhSn1FmdMwjLFwbUMMCwuIPuSO6hA21BWoHcB4wFbu5x5GPgRIDSYlXNobtnkyqP8MI_mB7UYfTua07cELi0rFFlfcMugrkeTybl-NBqeKBiZz7ymQf5kmemfVaenCJI4fMgnso-kWtYA8WOCMm6RYlP0kAx4b_pG9tg95JwSN6wytcbRu5WbMBWA5FoiXNFJLWEt333HpGEPCKvCxuxkOcUCoUyNDvcVQ1KjOOdPAwOMEJvm_hMsN6Rj-_lmUc7QpOQpJCs5lboUfpWg3EdI_T4WblQUUNsjAluaWB2bZtHmLsP576ExQj5Qx4bRfhHTnZNYTalnivYXc)

We are just _**one day**_ away from the Georgia runoff election, Peter, and if every person chips in today at the link below, we'll have enough resources to keep Herschel Walker in this fight!

There is a world of difference between sending Raphael Warnock - a hardened liberal who will rubber stamp Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer's socialist agenda - and Herschel Walker - a man who loves America and will fight to keep it free. subject: Our Border is the Battlefield
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Border Security PAC
body:
| | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=a4d0424503&e=fdefed58de)
---
Peter,The number one issue in this country is **border security.** I live at the border in El Paso so I know the chaos that happens here every single day.It’s worse than it ever has been despite the media’s absolute refusal to report it.For some reason, even our Republicans won’t go as hard to secure our border as they need to. They run on securing the border and then cut deals with Democrats to keep it open. **They SHOULD be impeaching Mayorkas. They should be making an ACTUAL barrier. THEY SHOULD NOT ALLOW THIS MESS!** I’m a Border Patrol wife who has seen up close and personal what it means when the Southern Border is left to the cartels... that’s why I’ve opened this PAC.
| [HELP IRENE SECURE OUR BORDER!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=8422825c5a&e=fdefed58de)
---
With this PAC, we’re going to do one thing: support candidates that will vow to secure our border and OPPOSE any Republican who is in office complacent about this issue.Sadly, the only thing that gets action in DC is money. That’s why we aim to be a financial juggernaut. With the right funding, we can get results and get action. That’s the language these people understand so we need to speak it.I cannot continue to sit by as this happens. I ran for Congress twice but the Open Borders Veronica Escobar and her dark money have continued to hold this seat. Now I’m taking the fight national.I need your help and I need it today. We want to show $14,000 in grassroots donations on our first day of launch. We can do it if everyone who receives this email donates $20.**I’m asking you because I truly need you. Will you pitch in and help me secure our border once and for all?**
| [Donate $20 right now! ](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=3e2693ea05&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [Donate $50 right now! ](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=8553c11e95&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [Donate MORE right now! ](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=40b37f8ac0&e=fdefed58de)
---
This is absolutely a battle for the soul and sovereignty of our nation. With your support, we can win it.

name: Alliance Defending Freedom
subject: BREAKING: ADF sues CVS
body:
This nurse practitioner’s story deserves to go viral. It’s a devastating example of what will continue to happen if we don
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr64d5o2b5v5rhijmhepmvk2b28jdp8f0075dj58_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9jmao72c1h2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zomru6ngt4mdh2d3lputdh5pfnnfgo8593p3urv0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9jmao72c1h2bs)
---
[**Sign The Petition: Don't Let CVS Purge Pro-Lifers**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z613klk25m6hur27fdfvgupv2c5f3h0qc2tfh0io_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9jmao72c1h2bs)
---
Friend, This nurse practitioner’s story deserves to go viral. It’s a devastating example of what will continue to happen if we don’t draw the line for freedom. [**_That’s why we’re suing CVS_**** _._**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5rrcksf9tniocs322782ocsr1tinr16ih2nm85g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9jmao72c1h2bs) But I’m getting ahead of myself. Paige Casey is a young nurse practitioner. For years, she faithfully served her community, working as a nurse practitioner at a local CVS MinuteClinic in Virginia. When she was hired, she made her employer aware that her Catholic faith prevented her from prescribing or dispensing abortion-inducing drugs._ _ CVS accommodated her religious conviction for three-and-a-half years and didn’t require her to administer any life-ending drugs. But then in 2022, they told Paige they would no longer allow her religious freedom. A few months later, **_she was fired—just two days after earning a performance-based raise._** **This is blatant religious discrimination, and according to Virginia law — it’s illegal.**
---
| | [**SIGN THE PETITION**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8mvf8djoqaqvolmknmbbae5rrlr135s5ue3h4p8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9jmao72c1h2bs)
---
With the ongoing effects still felt from the pandemic, health care workers are needed now more than ever. Forcing them to choose between violating their faith or being fired **_hurts everyone. _** **_And it’s downright un-American. _** Patients are best served by doctors, nurses, and other medical professionals who are free to act ethically and consistent with their beliefs. Despite having a spotless record, Paige is now _unemployed_ , simply because she stood for her faith. This unlawful discrimination cannot be allowed to stand. That’s why Alliance Defending Freedom is filing a lawsuit against CVS on behalf of Paige. ADF is the world’s largest legal organization committed to protecting religious freedom, free speech, marriage and family, parental rights, and the sanctity of life. We defend your most cherished liberties in Congress, state legislatures, and courtrooms across the country — all the way to the U.S. Supreme Court if necessary. [**But we need your help. Will you help us send a strong message to CVS by signing our petition below?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za424a4huhp1vbon6ithddnbgfe1jh92mmdheha8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9jmao72c1h2bs) **_We the People, CVS customers, will not stand by and watch attacks on the religious rights of all Americans. _**
---
[**SIGN THE PETITION**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7o5q47a6mtice3377tsklk7tr6bjhds65pfndhg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9jmao72c1h2bs)
---
Thank you in advance.
---
Alliance Defending Freedom
---
15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260
All donations are secure, private, and tax-deductible. Member ECFA.
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanactionnews.com/prefs/9z2zmprvo5dnj6g67tdt1thmkjmcj6i0cdqff2l5r70).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2k9d5hnhg91n79sa1orip49ug13kvqfft3g8r1g_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7c1h6epb0s9g649fg)

name: Senator Marco Rubio
subject: Asking from the bottom of my heart
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62030160:6fwsSEGqN:m:1:3253819041:841ABF84B12BD4005DED33829258E483:r)

It's time for some honest talk, Peter.

I won my re-election in Florida on Election Day, but Republicans nationally lost one seat in the U.S. Senate. _However, Georgia is headed to overtime with a runoff election._

When you read this, **I want you to be able to hear the alarm in my words.** I am concerned. We must not let our chance to flip this last Senate seat slip through our fingers when we're so close to victory.

**We need Herschel Walker to win if we want to hold on to our 50/50 split in the Senate. Without Herschel in the Senate, Republicans will get steamrolled by Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden's disastrous agenda for America.**

I'm asking you to _dig deep_. **Every other Senate race has now been decided, and whether we win in Georgia is going to come down to whether we can get our voters to the polls once again on December 6th.**

I've pledged to do anything I can for Herschel and his team, which is why I'm reaching out to you right now. **[Is flipping this seat from BLUE to RED worth any amount to you?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62030160:6fwsSEGqN:m:1:3253819041:841ABF84B12BD4005DED33829258E483:r)**

**Republicans have one final chance to show Americans that we can win tough races and get America back on track.** Herschel can only win in Georgia if he has the resources to fund his campaign for the next few hours.

[** HELP HERSCHEL FLIP THIS SEAT ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62030160:6fwsSEGqN:m:1:3253819041:841ABF84B12BD4005DED33829258E483:r)
**[If you invest in just one thing for the rest of this year, there's no better choice than investing directly in Herschel Walker's campaign. He can win his runoff on December 6th- but only with your help, Peter.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62030160:6fwsSEGqN:m:1:3253819041:841ABF84B12BD4005DED33829258E483:r)**

I know political emails can be pesky, but they serve an important purpose. Without your immediate help, I'm afraid we're going to blow a golden opportunity.

From the bottom of my heart, I'm asking you to get involved before it's too late. **[Send Herschel whatever you can right now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62030160:6fwsSEGqN:m:1:3253819041:841ABF84B12BD4005DED33829258E483:r)**

Thank you,

Marco Rubio
United States Senator

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62030160:6fwsSEGqN:m:1:3253819041:841ABF84B12BD4005DED33829258E483:r)

name: Joe Biden
subject: I hope you will split a $10 donation between RaphaelWarnock’s reelection campaign and the DNC.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
Raphael Warnock is facing a runoff tomorrow, and he’s relying on the immediate support of folks like you. | |
---
After you elected Kamala and me back in 2020, you didn’t take a second to rest. You turned right around and helped flip Georgia’s Senate seats, too. Now, one of those Georgia senators -- my friend Reverend Raphael Warnock -- is up for reelection to serve a full term, and he needs your help once again. He’s facing a runoff tomorrow, and polls are showing him neck and neck with his ultra-MAGA GOP opponent. Senator Warnock is relying on the immediate support of folks like you. **You haven’t donated to the DNC yet this year. Will you split a $10 donation between Senator Warnock’s campaign and the DNC today to support his campaign and elect Democrats nationwide?**

clean_body: Raphael Warnock is facing a runoff tomorrow, and he’s relying on the immediate support of folks like you. | | After you elected Kamala and me back in 2020, you didn’t take a second to rest. You turned right around and helped flip Georgia’s Senate seats, too. Now, one of those Georgia senators -- my friend Reverend Raphael Warnock -- is up for reelection to serve a full term, and he needs your help once again. He’s facing a runoff tomorrow, and polls are showing him neck and neck with his ultra-MAGA GOP opponent. Senator Warnock is relying on the immediate support of folks like you. You haven’t donated to the DNC yet this year. Will you split a $10 donation between Senator Warnock’s campaign and the DNC today to support his campaign and elect Democrats nationwide? Senator Warnock is running to continue to help working families succeed, boost our economy, secure investments in education, and empower communities everywhere. He’s the kind of fighter Georgians deserve. But I’ll be honest, Derek: We’re in the final sprint in this runoff, and there’s no waiting until later to act. There are no do-overs. That’s why we’re counting on you and this grassroots team to help expand our Democratic majority in the Senate. It looks like you haven’t donated this year, so I’m asking you to support Senator Warnock’s campaign and Democrats nationwide. Thank you for your support, Joe Joseph R. Biden, Jr. President of the United States When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit Democratic Senator Raphael Warnock -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come. If you no longer wish to receive these emails, you can to stop receiving these emails. Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, . If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, territories, and D.C., . Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, , and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

subject: Yesterday we had the perfect example of how crucial this seat is. As we negotiated to get rail workers what in the end will add, on average, $16,000 in back pay to each rail worker and additional bonuses, we couldn't get them seven days of paid sick leave. Because of the entire GOP. Oh, and Joe Manchin.
body:
Joe Manchin reminds us ...

| | | | | Peter, We are in the home-stretch, where we decide whether we want the advantages that come with a proven, moral leader such as Senator Warnock in the Senate, or...that other troglodytic entity that's running against him. Here we I wish to remind you of two things: **1. **Yesterday we had the perfect example of how crucial this seat is. _As we negotiated to get rail workers what in the end will add, on average, $16,000 in back pay to each rail worker and additional bonuses, we couldn't get them seven days of paid sick leave._ **_Because of the entire GOP. _****_Oh, and Joe Manchin._** Mr. Coal Mine Profiteer himself, who like all Senators has a roughly three-day-work week, couldn't bring himself to give rail workers needed sick leave. Yet, _had Raphael Warnock been there, we wouldn't have needed a single Republican vote nor the vote of Joe Manchin. That would've meant sick leave for workers. _ **_Electing Raphael Warnock Will Make A Real-World Difference In All Of Our Lives._** [**_$5. $10. $25. These are the kinds of donations that could make elect Senator Raphael Warnock and ensure we need not rely upon whatever mood happens to strike Senator Manchin._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3b727f96-8a39-4fca-a11a-20b2b3abac7a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | 2\. A Reminder: _555 more Democratic voters turning out to the polls in Colorado could have ended Lauren Boebert’s political career last month._ She held onto her seat in Congress by a mere 554 votes. _As we've been saying non-stop lately, Georgia's the second most expensive state in which to vote. .98 per voter. So every dollar we raise, will turn out another voter._ _The good news? ___We are now the favorites to win this race,_**_ but only if we turn out all of our voters._**_ _So it couldn't be more simple. These last two days,** **__**if we rush grassroots contributions to Senator Warnock to fight the $58 million in Mitch McConnell monopoly money dropped into Georgia to destroy him, we will win. Yet, If we don't, Herschel Walker can still pull an upset. **_ [**_Can you give $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to get re-elect Senator Warnock, and tell Mitch McConnell where he can stick his $58 million in corporate bribes?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T797b8c77-df70-488b-9055-36f2b52b12ad/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _The moment is upon us, Blue Amp Action community. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Michigan’s big turnaround
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresshttps://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42022?refcode=email12052022 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42022?refcode=email12052022]
Team,
Last week, the Michigan Board of Canvassers unanimously certified the Nov. 8 election. That means that you’ll now see “official results” on the data related to all Michigan races last month. The certification also solidified my biggest win margin yet at 5.4%.
Prior to 2020, most people didn’t even know about the Board, or the role canvassing plays when it comes to our elections. In short, each county has its own Board of Canvassers, which reviews the county-wide results. Once those Boards certify, the state Board provides a final certification to make everything official.
Every Board – either county or state – consists of four members: two Republicans and two Democrats. In 2020, many Boards in Michigan, including the state Board, saw one or both Republican members question or refuse certification. It’s often forgotten that in 2020, the only reason Michigan certified our election was because one brave Republican on the Board bucked his party and voted with the two Dem members.
Thankfully, this cycle’s certification was much smoother than two years ago. And this year’s election results prove that Michiganders are not going to accept the political instability of the past six years. And it wasn’t just in our race – we saw that in our statewide races, in our federal races, and in flipping both the state House & Senate.
I hope that Michigan can be a standard-setter on how to turn around a state. And that it's the beginning of a statement that the politics of division will not cut it anymore.
Thank you again for all you did to help me and other Michiganders succeed. We’ve been working since 2016 to have Michigan tell a different story, and we feel proud of what we accomplished.
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42022?refcode=email12052022]
Elissa

# [#]
About Elissa
Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan’s 8th district in Congress. In 2022, she is running to represent Michigan’s newly-drawn 7th district, which covers two-thirds of her existing district. Keep up with Elissa and the latest from the campaign trail on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/elissaslotkin] and Twitter. [https://twitter.com/ElissaSlotkin]

Contact Elissa
P.O. BOX 4145,
EAST LANSING, MI 48826
campaign@elissaforcongress.com [campaign@elissaforcongress.com]

name: Herschel
subject: Our fundraising has slowed
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I have some bad news. |
[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=37fca49713dd4c178480b398e9f05e66&_e=e5AUk2oVcoeOnv6I_xMXcEKfd35yGH69yCMXLhtFfb2kyFILeHwR6sxBffUM5Br89CDAYCSn99hV8Wl9ARYp5QB-GuehIgRrPr5mPRV456BJZMXxcDxMgeVHi8K6kaaIYAuuIo7uAiqlroQHukKIY0frDdDR3VJAqNvPHvYxlwuoccVc1sVrGj1dVZBsvbdWc_nzkafH-QPpiENLIqinv4K2N0ypjJON4JequVSe_ladTrhug0uUCuj-IdI16Aj0A164cATKKzvNzINx8PqWs0J0N3Awh-kxFSWmIPUHFH2H5LngklovhI0E7xiC4nuqdpL3XaxnfnS4unXv4FVq_DRBsR7Dz9F5MtdmW2YblESlLLyocLI0P4XTvWPXtLzKNRGtJgOQhWJHAhgiAf89NxKe3Yy03Di6Ufg85sACm3M%3D)

---
**Our fundraising has slowed down. If we're going to turn out voters in the final 24 hours of this runoff, we've got to crank things up. It's now or never.**
Fellow American,

The runoff election is less than 24 hours away.

We are trying to make every hour count, **but our fundraising numbers aren't where they should be.**

We always knew that Raphael Warnock would outraise us - even in the runoff, but the financial gap continues to grow.

**Senator Warnock has raised over $153 million and is on track to break all fundraising records in American history.**

We're in the turnout phase of the campaign, so missing a fundraising goal means that we don't have the money to invest in our ground game for the final hours of this runoff.

[** Help our Ground Game!
Chip in $5 -> **](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=37fca49713dd4c178480b398e9f05e66&_e=e5AUk2oVcoeOnv6I_xMXcEKfd35yGH69yCMXLhtFfb2kyFILeHwR6sxBffUM5Br89CDAYCSn99hV8Wl9ARYp5QB-GuehIgRrPr5mPRV456BJZMXxcDxMgeVHi8K6kaaIYAuuIo7uAiqlroQHukKIY0frDdDR3VJAqNvPHvYxlwuoccVc1sVrGj1dVZBsvbdWc_nzkafH-QPpiENLIqinv4K2N0ypjJON4JequVSe_ladTrhug0uUCuj-IdI16Aj0A164cATKKzvNzINx8PqWs72WI4vFxUADgYGO6m0UTPELCyMRfAsO1twh6hAxP-EUTv7kKtXLCjIEbWNbNNLRGE9vCbh3WEajq7UkgSCb6fs5EeC_V1lO1KgKgY8WvCx_Tei8-GAHRtG5PdfYPcfyTYJu9gSdtzBKYE7utEbCKFE%3D)
Fellow American, I know the number of emails and text messages we send can be annoying, but they are the backbone of our fundraising program. When you don't respond and we miss our fundraising goal, _our entire campaign suffers._

**If we don't properly fund our voter turnout operation, we're going to lose.**

**[I am counting on you to help make sure we have the funds we need to win this thing tomorrow! Please chip in $5 or more to help our ground game.](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=37fca49713dd4c178480b398e9f05e66&_e=e5AUk2oVcoeOnv6I_xMXcEKfd35yGH69yCMXLhtFfb2kyFILeHwR6sxBffUM5Br89CDAYCSn99hV8Wl9ARYp5QB-GuehIgRrPr5mPRV456BJZMXxcDxMgeVHi8K6kaaIYAuuIo7uAiqlroQHukKIY0frDdDR3VJAqNvPHvYxlwuoccVc1sVrGj1dVZBsvbdWc_nzkafH-QPpiENLIqinv4K2N0ypjJON4JequVSe_ladTrhug0uUCuj-IdI16Aj0A164cATKKzvNzINx8PqWs-Znu1_XsZy1h6ovOIpmFp4weeIDp9BYZAIvcc9bSrmqAtXS2ySJo949Fpv8dHkHl50_ITc6wHhg__hiPW29YaAYC25LDB45FU92ug1qzNkqobGpdYcpzqtiE80nfaxUa_4kYWhQpNzni0WEisvlQuw%3D)**

**It's now or never.**

Thanks,

[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=37fca49713dd4c178480b398e9f05e66&_e=e5AUk2oVcoeOnv6I_xMXcEKfd35yGH69yCMXLhtFfb2kyFILeHwR6sxBffUM5Br89CDAYCSn99hV8Wl9ARYp5QB-GuehIgRrPr5mPRV456BJZMXxcDxMgeVHi8K6kaaIYAuuIo7uAiqlroQHukKIY0frDdDR3VJAqNvPHvYxlwuoccVc1sVrGj1dVZBsvbdWc_nzkafH-QPpiENLIqinv4K2N0ypjJON4JequVSe_ladTrhug0uUCuj-IdI16Aj0A164cATKKzvNzINx8PqWsyGXg4PreQNPjlzcMTldhdi5iQQPTLZBmkxxgAwniKMqTlg-gDWgkIYkrk2OPhvNThM9j-qCFW0oXJfgptJRy6ZxYTr_dIMs1BC5wahnLlLvHlCSzy_diYJhIDMacyoLvhT0mvSggMjhykDj_gqiJ_s%3D)

Herschel Walker

body:
It's so important that we close this budget gap ASAP.
| | |
---

|
---
All eyes will be on our critical runoff election in Georgia tomorrow. If we win, Rev. Warnock will be the _51st vote_ in the Senate for our bold Democratic agenda.
**General election results show Rev. Warnock narrowly leading Herschel Walker – but now,****GOP donors are flooding Walker's campaign with MILLIONS to defeat us!**
Our chances of holding this seat will come down to whether we have enough resources to fight back and get out the vote. That's why it's so important that we close our budget gap ASAP.

**Rev. Warnock refuses to take a cent from corporate PACs, so he's relying entirely on grassroots folks like you to power him to victory. So please, before midnight:**

name: GOP Presidential
subject: Sign the Petition - No Taxpayer Funding for Abortion!
body:
Did you know there is a specific legislative provision ensuring that your federal tax dollars do not fund abortions?
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv4sdi69ot6tiu81bbca70v6s9m6qo81kagr0v4g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9jm1pb5chh2bs) | |
---
Dear fellow American,

Did you know there is a specific legislative provision ensuring that your federal tax dollars do not fund abortions?

Since 1976, the Hyde Amendment has protected American taxpayers from paying for abortions. Throughout its history, the Hyde Amendment has received widespread bipartisan support from both Congress and the White House. But if President Biden, House Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-Calif.), Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer (D-N.Y.), and their pro-abortion allies in Congress have their way, this critically important provision could be undone.

[**Please, right now, sign this No Taxpayer Funding of Abortion emergency petition to House Speaker Nancy Pelosi and Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zleh4amjkfkpkcbvqjrd4rihc5akdm6uu7nqrkno_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9jm1pb5chh2bs)
[**Sign the No Taxpayer Funding of Abortion petition**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdljs40t1kspat18ntpf2c6kej7irhekhq33gmq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9jm1pb5chh2bs)
The pro-abortion lobby is hard at work trying to roll back the Hyde Amendment, as well as the many pro-life victories achieved during the Trump administration, including:
* The Protecting Life in Global Health Assistance (PLGHA) policy, which blocked funding for international organizations that perform or promote abortion;
* A Title X rule change that closed an abortion funding loophole by ensuring financial and physical separation between family planning clinics and abortion facilities;
* An executive order that reinforced existing protections for children born prematurely, with disabilities, or in medical distress, including infants who survive abortion; and
* A conscience exemption from the Obamacare “contraceptive mandate” for organizations with moral or religious objections to purchasing insurance that includes coverage of contraceptives and abortion-causing drugs.

According to a January 2021 Marist poll, 58% of Americans oppose taxpayer funding of abortion. But unless you and I — and many thousands of other Americans who value life — speak up now, the Pelosi-led House and Schumer-led Senate are very likely to ignore the will of the people and act against our values and the lives of the unborn -- especially as a "lame-duck" session of Congress looms on the horizon!

[**You and I must take a stand NOW to preserve pro-life policy and ensure the Hyde Amendment remains intact for future generations.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlehjrgunc25om4pr062eg1591vd7ijibs960650_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9jm1pb5chh2bs)

President Biden’s proposed federal budget for this year removed the Hyde Amendment—following through on a campaign promise made by every Democratic presidential candidate in 2020. We must act now to demand that our tax dollars NOT fund abortions.

Family Research Council Action has been working feverishly to defeat the pro-abortion special interests and their allies in Congress.

We’ve been working with pro-life legislators in Congress to help secure the passage of important legislation, and we’ve been working at the state level all across America to protect life as well.

With Democrats in control of Congress for another two months, innocent unborn lives are at risk in America like never before.

If you and I remain silent, innocent children will tragically die.

[**Please help us fight back against President Joe Biden, Speaker Nancy Pelosi, Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, and their pro-abortion allies today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zke0p6lol4saa6if1q9j1v8udv76u56mnp6perg8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9jm1pb5chh2bs)
[**Sign the No Taxpayer Funding of Abortion petition**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ziagipc63e7sqv3521r58t7qh7r94cc3qn77oh3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9jm1pb5chh2bs)
Thank you, and God bless!

For America,

Lt. Gen. (Ret.) William G. Boykin
Executive Vice President
Family Research Council Action
|
---
**FRC Action**
801 G Street NW, Washington, D.C. 20001

Family Research Council Action (FRC Action) operates as a social welfare organization organized under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to FRC Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. Your contribution will be used in support of the general mission of FRC Action. FRC Action does not accept contributions designated or earmarked for the purpose of influencing an election.
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, [please use this preferences page](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2zjh6hcafrbngda4ercnq3a8bof9ae7d0m7p960u8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5sihnr34hrmn7v50rck9p8singd5e8drbfiknt0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9jm1pb5chh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Sign the Petition - No Taxpayer Funding for Abortion!
body:
Did you know there is a specific legislative provision ensuring that your federal tax dollars do not fund abortions?
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmkea7d9jim0k9jq46mfadi4nt1gli12rmob3n78_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9jm9pb5c9h2bs) | |
---
Dear fellow American,

Did you know there is a specific legislative provision ensuring that your federal tax dollars do not fund abortions?

Since 1976, the Hyde Amendment has protected American taxpayers from paying for abortions. Throughout its history, the Hyde Amendment has received widespread bipartisan support from both Congress and the White House. But if President Biden, House Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-Calif.), Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer (D-N.Y.), and their pro-abortion allies in Congress have their way, this critically important provision could be undone.

[**Please, right now, sign this No Taxpayer Funding of Abortion emergency petition to House Speaker Nancy Pelosi and Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp9h9h7hnga00mnk15ctte4lj07fv7app7rmihkg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9jm9pb5c9h2bs)
[**Sign the No Taxpayer Funding of Abortion petition**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqhmi5gnrud9ln5otkroghakd086cjqt6lpuipp8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9jm9pb5c9h2bs)
The pro-abortion lobby is hard at work trying to roll back the Hyde Amendment, as well as the many pro-life victories achieved during the Trump administration, including:
* The Protecting Life in Global Health Assistance (PLGHA) policy, which blocked funding for international organizations that perform or promote abortion;
* A Title X rule change that closed an abortion funding loophole by ensuring financial and physical separation between family planning clinics and abortion facilities;
* An executive order that reinforced existing protections for children born prematurely, with disabilities, or in medical distress, including infants who survive abortion; and
* A conscience exemption from the Obamacare “contraceptive mandate” for organizations with moral or religious objections to purchasing insurance that includes coverage of contraceptives and abortion-causing drugs.

According to a January 2021 Marist poll, 58% of Americans oppose taxpayer funding of abortion. But unless you and I — and many thousands of other Americans who value life — speak up now, the Pelosi-led House and Schumer-led Senate are very likely to ignore the will of the people and act against our values and the lives of the unborn -- especially as a "lame-duck" session of Congress looms on the horizon!

[**You and I must take a stand NOW to preserve pro-life policy and ensure the Hyde Amendment remains intact for future generations.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zctsnm8svla9dcr785pekpa2n1m9jjc2be0u70i8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9jm9pb5c9h2bs)

President Biden’s proposed federal budget for this year removed the Hyde Amendment—following through on a campaign promise made by every Democratic presidential candidate in 2020. We must act now to demand that our tax dollars NOT fund abortions.

Family Research Council Action has been working feverishly to defeat the pro-abortion special interests and their allies in Congress.

We’ve been working with pro-life legislators in Congress to help secure the passage of important legislation, and we’ve been working at the state level all across America to protect life as well.

With Democrats in control of Congress for another two months, innocent unborn lives are at risk in America like never before.

If you and I remain silent, innocent children will tragically die.

[**Please help us fight back against President Joe Biden, Speaker Nancy Pelosi, Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, and their pro-abortion allies today.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8t1n1400sk2dto6e6qdmgeusrv81jj258fbndt8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9jm9pb5c9h2bs)
[**Sign the No Taxpayer Funding of Abortion petition**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgi6jj2de9v2dhjqkntliau7ae3r7f8a5dm73e9g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c9jm9pb5c9h2bs)
Thank you, and God bless!

For America,

Lt. Gen. (Ret.) William G. Boykin
Executive Vice President
Family Research Council Action
|
---
**FRC Action**
801 G Street NW, Washington, D.C. 20001

Family Research Council Action (FRC Action) operates as a social welfare organization organized under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to FRC Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. Your contribution will be used in support of the general mission of FRC Action. FRC Action does not accept contributions designated or earmarked for the purpose of influencing an election.

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6dcs42i2ar5alna8muce4uae75hnj4annr880n8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7c1h6ep75clh649fg)

clean_body: Our last push of GOTV for Rev. Warnock. = | Fellow activist, we’ll keep this quick. Our organizers are on the ground in Georgia, supporting the New Georgia Project with their mission to knock on 1 million doors to get out the vote for tomorrow’s runoff election between Reverend Warnock and Herschel Walker. By now, you surely know how crucial this election is, and how razor-thin the margins are. So with just one day left, we’re asking for some support to get through this final push. = = In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : PRIMARY: May 2023, TBD GENERAL: November 7, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. | | | Republicans have been obsessing over Hunter Biden for over three years and concocting wild conspiracy theories about what's on his laptop. And they've found exactly nothing. Nevertheless, Kevin McCarthy has promised to hold hearings on it once Republicans take control of Congress. And Donald Trump has even called for "terminating" the Constitution because of it. Seriously! Enough already. We’re sick of Republican stupidity. So please join us, and add your name. [Tell Republicans: "I don't give a damn about Hunter Biden's laptop!" >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf2d77887-8f00-43cc-ab70-9efd8bb31335/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Peter, We know we’ve been emailing you for months. The midterm elections cycle is finally coming to a close tomorrow! And the Georgia runoff is going to be TIGHT. ****[**Recent polling puts Reverend Raphael Warnock and Herschel Walker neck and neck. Rush a donation to Warnock now so he can get ahead and win this runoff in Georgia >>**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wqcJuDX2HRji8zceUQ74uM4upaqCmwZERme01Uc144J7PjyD3l4_TdL1rFaeE5jJKxd_JKw2NEYIFQ_cs9yuqbqwFwakrbTOzFk6-4Qtd1UjIn6LKX4JtPnuW4tx5mu005BjWBgIdNJXHyBUXs-A1Ay2PPnHZfXMBfiTy53n79j55b4pGAjTnPnEPPSt1EN9_4fxThYsLHv-Ol8HXbDDw3v1er1SBabPEB4GNXGl-DUenJfj1izdXAGa-cr97x7ARYBTSSiHm_jI7J_XeULC0c894ggkGkjToCYBh-m7r1OA/3rq/yAYJsUr4T2iE_Y078eJFGA/h1/q1rLnp66-QFJ-Fc6OwgiaIiQzJ0ungyWM13gsxvSwd4) Herschel Walker is one of the most radical Republicans running this cycle: he’s been caught red-handed in countless lies – and he has a documented history of domestic violence. His entire candidacy has been a disgrace. If we want to keep Herschel Walker as far from the Senate as possible, we must make sure Warnock wins tomorrow. **[Split a contribution between Warnock and our PAC to secure his seat >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wqcJuDX2HRji8zceUQ74uM4upaqCmwZERme01Uc144JzsS3tJznGzjlFIf5heOEoCZzB7mYQZN3vqqnuevUDav2Npwf1uVDanpq2E6IaDXM2o7xaf3yIi0FpIhGHUZPfifIqnuj052e23M75quD3zrVxk9U9qRwfBCqhjnOTXkfHin2faOGgK5UNlwrjs_xQqDCIWEfF3zMxCDIf3yj6cylgrY3KeD6MTPT6OythBMF2pbjv0K_cQEpWziOUPc4Zx2mncgjo8jZZ-HaDobequxvhq9mrIisHjPC24-7giK2w/3rq/yAYJsUr4T2iE_Y078eJFGA/h2/lsg3MA80U-REE16fpw29-RLJY7N5m_AfCwUfqMYdTtk)** Not to mention, a Warnock win gets Democrats to 51 seats – unlocking a true majority instead of a tied Senate, and making it much less easy for Kyrsten Sinema or Joe Manchin to obstruct progress. And the Georgia runoff is going to be TIGHT. ** Herschel Walker is one of the most radical Republicans running this cycle: he’s been caught red-handed in countless lies – and he has a documented history of domestic violence. His entire candidacy has been a disgrace. If we want to keep Herschel Walker as far from the Senate as possible, we must make sure Warnock wins tomorrow. Not to mention, a Warnock win gets Democrats to 51 seats – unlocking a true majority instead of a tied Senate, and making it much less easy for Kyrsten Sinema or Joe Manchin to obstruct progress. If you didn't get a chance to join our rally, here's what you need to know: **tomorrow, we're going to win this runoff election and keep Georgia blue.**

But here’s the thing: Republicans know this, and they’re afraid. We narrowly led Herschel Walker in the general election – so now the GOP is flooding this race with more than $58 million to help Walker take the lead.

They won’t hold back, and neither can we. That’s why I urgently need your support to help hit our critical goal before midnight tonight.

**Peter, I’m asking:[_Will you please split $10 – or whatever you can between Linda Sánchez and me – so we can win in Georgia and expand our razor-thin Democratic majority?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55597732/382162905/-1866927480?refcode=BLU-SAN-20221205-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjQ0ZjBkMS1mMDc0LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4vWAWv9i7UNCnhxtwvXR3a4YmSip2UQ_atYrwdbCaS0=)**

Thank you so much for all you do, Peter.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock

**Our fundraising has slowed down. If we're going to turn out voters in the final 24 hours of this runoff, we've got to crank things up. It's now or never.**
Friend,

The runoff election is less than 24 hours away.

We are trying to make every hour count, **but our fundraising numbers aren't where they should be.**

We always knew that Raphael Warnock would outraise us – even in the runoff, but the financial gap continues to grow.

**Senator Warnock has raised over $153 million and is on track to break all fundraising records in American history.**

We're in the turnout phase of the campaign, so missing a fundraising goal means that we don't have the money to invest in our ground game for the final hours of this runoff.

subject: Peter, I won’t beat around the bush

body:
Why your $10 is important
|
---
| | |
We are just _**one day**_ away from the Georgia runoff election, Peter, and if every person chips in today at the link below, we'll have enough resources to keep Herschel Walker in this fight!
---
| | | [CHIP IN $25](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62030221:6vz84EGgN:m:1:3253819041:A7FADA0FE9DF4DBDAF802C3B13D0D699:r)
---
The type of leaders we send to Washington MATTERS. There is a world of difference between sending Raphael Warnock - a hardened liberal who will rubber stamp Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer's socialist agenda - and Herschel Walker - a man who loves America and will fight to keep it free. Herschel Walker is the fighter we need in the U.S. Senate. He will stand up to the woke mob, the big spenders, and the bureaucrats who want to control our daily lives.

With the election just day away -- _**[Herschel needs all the help he can get to make sure he wins.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62030221:6vz84EGgN:m:1:3253819041:A7FADA0FE9DF4DBDAF802C3B13D0D699:r "Herschel needs all the help he can

I know we've been asking a lot lately, but it would mean the world to me if you helped conservatives lock down this Senate seat in Georgia.

clean_body: Why your $10 is important | | | | We are just one day away from the Georgia runoff election, Peter, and if every person chips in today at the link below, we'll have enough resources to keep Herschel Walker in this fight! | | | The type of leaders we send to Washington MATTERS. There is a world of difference between sending Raphael Warnock - a hardened liberal who will rubber stamp Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer's socialist agenda - and Herschel Walker - a man who loves America and will fight to keep it free. Herschel Walker is the fighter we need in the U.S. Senate. He will stand up to the woke mob, the big spenders, and the bureaucrats who want to control our daily lives. With the election just day away -- "Herschel needs all the help he can get to make sure he wins." | | I know we've been asking a lot lately, but it would mean the world to me if you helped conservatives lock down this Senate seat in Georgia. My very best, Nikki Haley | | | x | | Paid for by Stand for America PAC. name: Rev. Warnock
subject: humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/31871?t=1009&amount=32&akid=6469%2E3611125%2Eri17ck ][IMG]

Friends, tomorrow is the Senate runoff.

With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I
can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your
immediate support. That's why I'm humbly asking: [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/31871?t=1010&amount=32&akid=6469%2E3611125%2Eri17ck ]Will you split $32 or
more right now between me and Tim Ryan to keep Georgia blue?

GOP donors are flooding our race with over $37 million—and Mitch
McConnell's super PAC has launched attack ad after attack ad against me.
Republicans are determined to flip Georgia red.

I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win—but with national
Republicans going all-in to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a
second. We've set a goal to raise another $200,000 today so we can fight
back against GOP attacks—but we're falling short, and I need your help.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/31871?t=1011&amount=32&akid=6469%2E3611125%2Eri17ck ]Please,
will you split a donation of $32 or more between me and Tim Ryan so we can
win in Georgia and expand our Democratic Senate majority?

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/31871?t=1012&express_lane=true&amount=32&akid=6469%2E3611125%2Eri17ck ]Donate $32 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/31871?t=1013&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=6469%2E3611125%2Eri17ck ]Donate $50

Thank you for all that you do.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock

name: =?utf-8?Q?Russ=20Vought?=
subject: Kevin McCarthy is on life support
body:
There is still time to stop the establishment. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/citizensrenewingamerica.com/were-on-the-offensive-10262615?e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | |
---
| | |
#
Friends,

Against all odds a small band of America First conservatives in the House have put Kevin McCarthy’s bid for Speaker of the House on life support.

Reps. Matt Gaetz, Bob Good, Matt Rosendale, Ralph Norman, and Andy Biggs have, so far, [maintained their publicly-stated position](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=f10e197050&e=17913c7d6d), to not vote for McCarthy as Speaker in January.

**Predictably, the Washington cartel is having a meltdown**. They want an establishment figure who will play by their rules and not rock the boat. They want the America First movement to stand down. They want Kevin McCarthy.

That’s exactly why more conservatives in the House should join these courageous fighters and refuse to accept a Kevin McCarthy Speakership.

Don’t believe the lies that are circling around Washington or the deceptions being pushed on the Sunday shows that a Democrat could be elected Speaker. I joined Steve Bannon on _War Room_ to debunk these myths and outline what conservatives must do NOW to stop McCarthy.
---
|
---
| **How We Keep Fighting**
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=a4c1696d23&e=17913c7d6d)
---

As I [explained to Bannon](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=b9735ed522&e=17913c7d6d), “ _on January 3rd, there is a Speaker vote on the floor, Kevin McCarthy has not won yet, he does not have 218 votes.. and conservatives are in the driver’s seat to make sure they have a paradigm-shifting person to become Speaker.”_

If more conservatives join the revolt against the establishment and refuse to back McCarthy, Republicans in the House will be forced to nominate a new candidate for Speaker ahead of the January 3rd vote.

And there is precedent for this. As I went on to explain, “ _all hell will not break loose, this has been done before, this is how Mark Meadows got rid of John Boehner.. Democrats didn’t collude with Republican moderates because the political fundamentals don’t work."_

**Translation** : _Conservatives have the power to determine who will be our next Speaker of the House. Period._

|
---
| **Where to Go From Here**
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=fefbf7a80e&e=17913c7d6d)
---
|
---
| My CRA colleague Rachel Semmel [said it perfectly](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=2679810f3a&e=17913c7d6d) on OAN, “ _Americans gave back control of the House of Representatives to Republicans with a mandate to stop Biden’s woke and weaponized government agenda._ ”

That means a paradigm-shifting war-time Speaker of the House who is not afraid to go to battle with the Biden Administration.

Conservatives in Congress _should listen to their constituents_ and join Reps. Gaetz, Good, Norman, and others by pledging to not vote for McCarthy as our next Speaker. If enough join the revolt, his candidacy will fail and a better candidate will emerge.

**There is still time. We can stop McCarthy. All that is needed is the courage to keep fighting**.
---
|
Sincerely,

Russ Vought
President
Citizens for Renewing America
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=14fb5a9d1b&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=09bc2fe61b&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=0a7aa18d56&e=17913c7d6d)
---
|
---

300 Independence Ave. SE
Washington, DC 20003

You can [update your preferences](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=340a9f3c7d&e=17913c7d6d&c=4a450d6877) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=340a9f3c7d&e=17913c7d6d&c=4a450d6877).

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: just $10
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55598566/382165513/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221205_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjc4MTkwMi1mNDc0LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y8WSeTw7YUhhBoqIT-TfA2vFLNtFADGZazDUPJB-p3I=&emci=e8958980-c274-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=f6781902-f474-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=252045)

$10 – that's how much I'm asking you to donate today. Your $10 could help me beat the odds (again), keep Georgia blue, and expand our Senate majority. And your support has never been more urgent. Right now, I’m running neck and neck with my opponent, Herschel Walker. With less than 24 hours until the runoff election, we need all hands on deck to power our campaign through the final stretch. **I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I mean it when I say your $10 could mean the difference between winning and losing this race. clean_body: The latest polling show we’re tied. Here’s how we will win >> | Peter, We only have one day until the runoff election on Tuesday against Raphael Warnock. Despite being on track to become the top Senate fundraiser IN AMERICAN HISTORY, Senator Warnock still cannot pull ahead of our grassroots campaign. He's raised over $153 million and lobbed vicious and FALSE attacks against me, but he's stuck below 50%. This is bad news for any incumbent, Peter. Polling - including our own internal data - shows we're TIED. The only way to break this tie and win tomorrow is with a massive ground game. Raphael Warnock just got a boost from Joe Biden, Barack Obama, and Hollywood celebrities, but I'm looking for support from YOU. If the Democrats win a 51-seat Senate majority, they can push through every single radical plan they have. I'm like Ricky Bobby in the movie "Talladega Nights." I don't come to lose. So, Peter, I am personally asking for your help. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: Georgians are heading to the polls
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mandela Barnes for Wisconsin
body:
#
I'm fired up!
It is runoff Election Day TOMORROW here in Georgia. Our team is on the ground right now – knocking on doors and mobilizing the voters who will help us keep Georgia blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority.
But we have a problem: Mitch McConnell's super PAC is funneling over $50 million into our state to flood the airwaves with attack ads and elect Herschel Walker. **I'm worried that if we don't fight back ASAP, we could get outspent and drowned out before voters head to the polls.**
**That's why we set an ambitious goal to ensure we have the resources we need to spread our pro-Georgia message to voters in this final stretch and win.** But with time running out before this critical deadline, we're not on track to reach our goal.
[**So, I'm personally asking: Will you split $3 or more right now between me and Leading the PAC to help us hit our goal, reach more voters, and keep Georgia blue?**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=leading-the-pac-em-warnock-split-dec22.e6VC8o&refcode=em221205-1-t2&t=1&akid=4102%2E196590%2EmgaieE)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Express Donate: $3](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1272?c0=leading-the-pac-em-warnock-split-dec22.0Ua7Yv&refcode=em221205-1-t2&t=20&akid=4102%2E196590%2EmgaieE)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=leading-the-pac-em-warnock-split-dec22.sgCJ0e&refcode=em221205-1-t2&t=21&akid=4102%2E196590%2EmgaieE)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=leading-the-pac-em-warnock-split-dec22.vlUKPw&refcode=em221205-1-t2&t=22&akid=4102%2E196590%2EmgaieE)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=leading-the-pac-em-warnock-split-dec22.-TmDCS&refcode=em221205-1-t2&t=23&akid=4102%2E196590%2EmgaieE)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=leading-the-pac-em-warnock-split-dec22.gJjgRB&refcode=em221205-1-t2&t=24&akid=4102%2E196590%2EmgaieE)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=leading-the-pac-em-warnock-split-dec22.e6VC8o&refcode=em221205-1-t2&t=25&akid=4102%2E196590%2EmgaieE)
I'm deeply appreciative of you – today and every day. Let's go win this thing!
– Rev. Raphael Warnock

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=26&akid=4102%2E196590%2EmgaieE). P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Being honest with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
America can't handle this loss
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| |
---
| | | | | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._xRsgN4pwr7g-mg)
---
| |
Fellow Conservative, it’s Herschel Walker. I know you’re busy, so I’ll be quick.

It’s official. Nikki Haley was right—Georgia is the TOUGHEST race in the country.

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Election Day, our Senate race is headed to a RUNOFF election on Tuesday, December 6.**

**Once again, it all comes down to Georgia.**

Two years ago, Democrats beat Republicans in Georgia, but we’re not going to let history repeat itself.

If far-Left Democrat Raphael Warnock wins this race again, there will be dire consequences for Georgia and our country. He’s weak on crime, reckless with our tax dollars, and a threat to our values.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff...and we’re quickly running out of time.

My opponent is the #1 fundraising senator in America, _**[so I need your urgent support to close the gap and FLIP THIS SEAT.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject. "so I need your urgent support to close the gap and FLIP THIS SEAT.")**_
---
| | | | | [HELP ME WIN THIS RACE](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-puyzohuDLzALXhYJWEkaA)
---
| | | | [EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTION OF $10](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
| | [EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTION OF $20](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-jsedHY-j4JRUoHsoBkWg)
---
| | | [EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTION OF $30](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-zEApTJ47FkPYrRUfO9A)
---
| | | Democrats are already salivating about the liberal policies Raphael Warnock will help them pass in a Democrat-led Senate.

You and I must work together to stop this from happening. The path to victory is clear. The question is, will you help me get that victory, Fellow Conservative?

I know you are a patriot who is willing to go the extra mile, _**[so can I count on you IMMEDIATELY?](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._ngDYvU5EIJeS9ZPp5RdA "so can I count on you IMMEDIATELY?")**_
---
|
---
| | | [HELP ME WIN THIS RACE](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._H45qHUw)
---
To victory,

Herschel Walker
U.S. Senate Candidate
---
|

name: Patty Murray
subject: We need to help Senator Warnock win
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
The final Senate race will be decided TOMORROW.
#
Peter,
I will always be grateful for this incredible team who helped us defend this seat on Election Day.
With your support, Democrats held crucial seats in Arizona, Nevada, New Hampshire, Colorado and more — and we even flipped a red seat blue with Pennsylvania electing John Fetterman!
But we all know this fight isn’t finished yet. The final Senate race of the 2022 election will be decided in a runoff TOMORROW — _**and we need to help Senator Raphael Warnock win it.**_
**[We already held our 50-vote majority, but we need every Democratic vote we can get, especially with Republicans taking control of the House next year. Can you rush in a contribution to help Raphael Warnock get over the finish line and win in tomorrow’s runoff?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55598828/382166798/909550491?refcode=pm_em_221205_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjlkZDdjNi1mNjc0LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=alpcaCUwx_ozQERuxCyf4h0HtgaYKcyZG87Apu4o4No=)**

Patty Murray

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: Georgians are heading to the polls
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20221205-8157-header&t=1&akid=8157%2E434096%2EVw66b_)
Derek — I'm fired up!
It is runoff Election Day TOMORROW here in Georgia. Our team is on the ground right now — knocking on doors and mobilizing the voters who will help us keep Georgia blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority.
But we have a problem: Mitch McConnell's super PAC is funneling over $50 million into our state to flood the airwaves with attack ads and elect Herschel Walker. **I'm worried that if we don't fight back ASAP, we could get outspent and drowned out before voters head to the polls.**
**That's why we set an ambitious goal to ensure we have the resources we need to spread our pro-Georgia message to voters in this final stretch and win.** But with time running out before this critical deadline, we're not on track to reach our goal.
**[So, I'm personally asking: Will you split $5 or more right now between me and John Fetterman to help us hit our goal, reach more voters, and keep Georgia blue?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221205-1?refcode=em20221205-8157&amount=5&refcode2=8157_434096_Vw66b_&akid=8157%2E434096%2EVw66b_)**
**[Donate $5 Now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221205-1?amount=5&refcode=em20221205-8157&refcode2=8157_434096_Vw66b_&akid=8157%2E434096%2EVw66b_)**
I'm deeply appreciative of you, Derek — today and every day. Let's go win this thing!
— Rev. Raphael Warnock

[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
---|---|---
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8157%2E434096%2EVw66b_)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: David Weinman
subject: electric
disclaimer_text: Paid for by An America United](https://links
body:
...& looking to the future! | | | About last Wednesday... It was electric, friend. _**An America United**_ hosted a commemoration of Governor Larry Hogan's eight years leading deep-blue Maryland, where he was able to deliver common sense, conservative victories for the people. Thousands of supporters of our movement turned out.
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=d15798ac2e81464b9741caac1c191664&_e=tmJZTnBCJI0pVEz2idl1XyQiiNkPwp9V7ggJhr4wwXPKzCkB-Mn1nKx0fVkRTDc4vRbL1f_gvebec3Q4fjS2hFtk47SXo8BPDneQLKiExUbso9F4DWea1oYjDLPp2NVdaGD5i1-pQNbAy75aTUxtcAuBLNxVIrXp8zEaUi0pxe9QhEjwTwpc44_LiTK7hRi_BFNeke9_M48jYBCD_1Xj0Z_mvaY8UK0S0Mew0pkIJY8y2Oyu0_xTy35xhoHAGpwZ_Luoy_s_A7BBeCg3FQ4wTw%3D%3D)
---
During his time in office, and in a tumultuous time in America's political history, Governor Hogan has served as a shining example of what it means to scrub out ridiculous partisan lines and reach across the aisle to create good, common sense policy for all. _**An America United**_ is working in tandem with the Governor to find a better path forward and hit a major reset for the Republican party because he is not giving up on it, and neither should we. Governor Hogan has been instrumental in building a coalition of thoughtful, compassionate, and conservative leaders who will elevate the voices of the exhausted majority and unite Americans. [**The future is wide open, and we ask you to chip in $10, $25, $55 or even more to keep this movement going.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=d15798ac2e81464b9741caac1c191664&_e=tmJZTnBCJI0pVEz2idl1XyQiiNkPwp9V7ggJhr4wwXPKzCkB-Mn1nKx0fVkRTDc4vRbL1f_gvebec3Q4fjS2hFtk47SXo8BPDneQLKiExUbso9F4DWea1oYjDLPp2NVdhSO1e6YLlKW4SVkH0Tussddh-gl2KY7fX3g-Qv_ypQQ_9KECmxuWWxBmpYXOImhnhQwk_g57smIuWrHUeEQPLDpnnRLxn3tnzYfeiHFqqxbFuZ3SLPp5-bUQim3rJOeIDVgR-DE7c5FnMYudJSlR-A%3D%3D)
---
Thank you,
**David Weinman**
_Executive Director, An America United_

clean_body: ...& looking to the future! | | | About last Wednesday... It was electric, friend. An America United hosted a commemoration of Governor Larry Hogan's eight years leading deep-blue Maryland, where he was able to deliver common sense, conservative victories for the people. Thousands of supporters of our movement turned out. During his time in office, and in a tumultuous time in America's political history, Governor Hogan has served as a shining example of what it means to scrub out ridiculous partisan lines and reach across the aisle to create good, common sense policy for all. An America United is working in tandem with the Governor to find a better path forward and hit a major reset for the Republican party because he is not giving up on it, and neither should we. Governor Hogan has been instrumental in building a coalition of thoughtful, compassionate, and conservative leaders who will elevate the voices of the exhausted majority and unite Americans. Thank you, David Weinman Executive Director, An America United | | | Join An America United on social media! | | ---|--- | | | | | |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Sykes=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Phonebank Kickoff for Sen. Warnock with Congresswoman-Elect Emilia Sykes!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/emiliasykesforcongress/emilia-sykes-announces-campaign-for-us-congress-16658547-rofflx9kf8-17002871?e=7730fa895a)
---
| |
---
|
> Good Afternoon,
>
> I'm excited to be hosting a virtual phone bank **TONIGHT (12/5) at 6p ET** to Get Out The Vote for Senator Warnock! Your help is needed to power Senator Warnock’s campaign over the finish line. And we have many phone calls to make!
>
> Your phone banking efforts will reach as many voters as possible and assist them with making a plan to vote. Sen. Warnock is running neck and neck with his opponent and our calls to Georgia voters are critical. You all helped lead me to victory in November and now we need to help Senator Warnock. So, I have to ask:
>
> **Will you sign up to volunteer from home to Get Out the Vote?** **[I'm In](https://emiliasykesforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=83820386dcff6cbe03ccbaec8&id=755f216d42&e=7730fa895a)** Talking to Georgia voters about Sen. Warnock is one of the most powerful ways that you can make a direct impact and do your part in the fight to win the Georgia runoff election.
>
> Thanks for all that you do and I look forward to seeing you tonight,
> Congresswoman-Elect Emilia Sykes
---
|
Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
---
| | | | | | | [](https://emiliasykesforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=83820386dcff6cbe03ccbaec8&id=d9c80594f9&e=7730fa895a)

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1253f6e0af6d4927961cd4b99423c344&_e=LyMkQ9RQy2GXK9C4n9EsjdD-iHTWg0qgrbi_CxSAgDidvttDC4yGzBLvY82tdxdxT-BU52EXJGH5GEz73J3DMQSS8F9BFAnPgOIu8XaPTxtQeOlPlvLtBQD27YuShDuwldQ03xqGTHxaXekkut7-r23yDHJEPq9RpbEpCW0XBD_9EK5BCM6gM4brLIh1rw7vepyN3HKkZmNytGVK1xUT-n-ipyE9USPWnP6GRIiT1p7z63--uJmZS6y1kqDGkdulezdOYr8fGC1vctFdfRmn9EZPzWLsoAvfVvN7d_X-I_E4aNkj0GHVcmta5sxCegXm_lBxo676MI6RkWjAwQ3nvFcxd12mMHxWBh3UTkfgdbmYZ_mmsJvj0HFXbjOJ3p5jZEBRzGkgIoinTdGY-K_7CQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1253f6e0af6d4927961cd4b99423c344&_e=LyMkQ9RQy2GXK9C4n9EsjdD-iHTWg0qgrbi_CxSAgDidvttDC4yGzBLvY82tdxdxT-BU52EXJGH5GEz73J3DMQSS8F9BFAnPgOIu8XaPTxtQeOlPlvLtBQD27YuShDuwldQ03xqGTHxaXekkut7-r23yDHJEPq9RpbEpCW0XBD_9EK5BCM6gM4brLIh1rw7vepyN3HKkZmNytGVK1xUT-n-ipyE9USPWnP6GRIiT1p4PuC8klBovFrRDQK38MH2weu1MwIyNjSYFKDbaVFA67oAHoCjImpGvQfTdf_dxStGgWgp69w3eNiHdzzPWKeXN6k2alJYm67eUHDZ1mF-YkeBBl9iJmG5BkV9mr0aR0njNrJj87bpYmAp_FM7bTa8jHnu1VfkxG0cPpCYl4BiBZw%3D%3D)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1253f6e0af6d4927961cd4b99423c344&_e=LyMkQ9RQy2GXK9C4n9EsjdD-iHTWg0qgrbi_CxSAgDidvttDC4yGzBLvY82tdxdxT-BU52EXJGH5GEz73J3DMQSS8F9BFAnPgOIu8XaPTxtQeOlPlvLtBQD27YuShDuwldQ03xqGTHxaXekkut7-r23yDHJEPq9RpbEpCW0XBD_9EK5BCM6gM4brLIh1rw7vepyN3HKkZmNytGVK1xUT-n-ipyE9USPWnP6GRIiT1p7P1K0OeujgFqMKMGDU4pzL8GF1zQk2Eu31U-z61YmA4_SpzrSyZUOvFdqHu5oT4Ou5piThx1eARyQXCN9CIiDA0zJDZfwo6buFiyV609G08xhYUX8N9P4SzHRHL2CeMwKFDQ88LoJGQzvCUr_tYqN7mnXYhuonetynock3RtdRbA%3D%3D)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

Our strength has always been in our collective ability to show up when Georgia, and our country, need it most. |
