| | Cianti here. In the midst of Election Day prep, I wanted to send you a short note to express my deep gratitude. Since the moment it was official that there would be a runoff election here in Georgia, our team sprung into action to lead a massive voter mobilization effort across the state. In fact, everything we’ve been able to accomplish to date is because of supporters like you. When anti-voter politicians tried to limit voting periods, we remained laser-focused on helping folks make their plans to vote. When voters experienced issues at their polling locations, we responded with efficiency and determination to find solutions. It’s because of you and this tireless team that we were able to scale up our voter outreach and meet voters where they are. Our super power has always been in our collective ability to show up when Georgia, and our country, need it most. And I know this team will only grow stronger as we approach Election Day tomorrow and as we prepare for all the work that lies ahead. With this movement leading the charge, I’m confident we can make history again in Georgia. **Every phone call, every text message, every conversation with a voter, every ballot cast, and every grassroots donation will continue to make a difference in this neck-and-neck Runoff Election.** Thank you, Cianti Stewart-Reid
Executive Director, Fair Fight [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55599573/382184178/147276702?refcode=bsc_emm_csr_20221205_f_ty_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTljYzE1Yi1mZTc0LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ip4Ej-hKHBDgVEL6P5vW_BKOxTkfLD6A2ocbiplcP_g=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55599574/382184179/147276702?refcode=bsc_emm_csr_20221205_f_ty_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTljYzE1Yi1mZTc0LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ip4Ej-hKHBDgVEL6P5vW_BKOxTkfLD6A2ocbiplcP_g=)

subject: I’m not sure what we’re going to do
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I have some bad news. |
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f321b487923a4a09b13d93cd3f226b30&_e=9welpkvXd7B-w49mOh9KwhiWWCRHHNcuR6MmHAbu3cC0MTjbZGa7mXc293E65f2Vb1PmFujfNWBNCM40V3rJxuPx-AekYiVlz-OjUOFsQGHtpxQH4giPE7Bzlj8Eev_VD4k1fOsYTm-_3_ZHxBLqPh0EOAWIaLhREo67VRYjSkosfyxdOmqASm37ZmFsSB3v7Vg1p9JZHZB7Ogt3GOR_X6ymuFLd7GrkXD7hYiGh4CV_HOiNyo1bcNFEPNdQrlokVZW2X_4VxUTv2R_aoDXNIneD-euMOAp6ueGzIHUzFudUgU_XTcS9Pfao2YGyO-jivXdBws0jP-YJNwF6Sb0jz0g4ExK9cqLh_f5wGZGDc-zdgQlcbz10B5ufYFszH_qqrySLDezb-EKzWX5wUKr2GO6AOChN8_xXGD4WgVKH-Ly-ivqyxvmkg6tBaJVNAyOi)

**Our fundraising has slowed down. If we're going to turn out voters in the final 24 hours of this runoff, we've got to crank things up. It's now or never.**
Fellow American,

The runoff election is less than 24 hours away.

We are trying to make every hour count, **but our fundraising numbers aren't where they should be.**

We always knew that Raphael Warnock would outraise us - even in the runoff, but the financial gap continues to grow.

**Senator Warnock has raised over $153 million and is on track to break all fundraising records in American history.**

We're in the turnout phase of the campaign, so missing a fundraising goal means that we don't have the money to invest in our ground game for the final hours of this runoff.

[** Help our Ground Game!
Chip in $5 -> **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f321b487923a4a09b13d93cd3f226b30&_e=9welpkvXd7B-w49mOh9KwhiWWCRHHNcuR6MmHAbu3cC0MTjbZGa7mXc293E65f2Vb1PmFujfNWBNCM40V3rJxuPx-AekYiVlz-OjUOFsQGHtpxQH4giPE7Bzlj8Eev_VD4k1fOsYTm-_3_ZHxBLqPh0EOAWIaLhREo67VRYjSkosfyxdOmqASm37ZmFsSB3v7Vg1p9JZHZB7Ogt3GOR_X6ymuFLd7GrkXD7hYiGh4CV_HOiNyo1bcNFEPNdQrlokVZW2X_4VxUTv2R_aoDXNIp_aYYa3S4kinpNrDLTyWDsXTJjjqVMseAyILiTYCDT61k22SbprlDmfFUPIZWS3ObDf3Y6pZETkrw1Um4ATsAvciYWWi-I6kICKOaBZfQhggpQTsEDJPOIid48s24VwamM4gMUZDL52LEJE1c2Dh5hsBQavdqQh9rOpcjSEEw07)
Fellow American, I know the number of emails and text messages we send can be annoying, but they are the backbone of our fundraising program. When you don't respond and we miss our fundraising goal, _our entire campaign suffers._

**If we don't properly fund our voter turnout operation, we're going to lose.**

**[I am counting on you to help make sure we have the funds we need to win this thing tomorrow! Please chip in $5 or more to help our ground game.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f321b487923a4a09b13d93cd3f226b30&_e=9welpkvXd7B-w49mOh9KwhiWWCRHHNcuR6MmHAbu3cC0MTjbZGa7mXc293E65f2Vb1PmFujfNWBNCM40V3rJxuPx-AekYiVlz-OjUOFsQGHtpxQH4giPE7Bzlj8Eev_VD4k1fOsYTm-_3_ZHxBLqPh0EOAWIaLhREo67VRYjSkosfyxdOmqASm37ZmFsSB3v7Vg1p9JZHZB7Ogt3GOR_X6ymuFLd7GrkXD7hYiGh4CV_HOiNyo1bcNFEPNdQrlokVZW2X_4VxUTv2R_aoDXNIhrnGhrQ6AY5Q8KlwDai9f05s1voZigcAd9xWQyvjoya-89FzrAGQc0mAByBkmyd8IWAOe7Ii_5EdoxKV3baVRvV9A0VTrNlsewKsVcjojHOa-MmidTbcllyMECN-HFEPfqM-pnCdUhRUttuBESDv_UTHiw0KoY6Giu601gRllov)**

**It's now or never.**

Thanks,

clean_body: I have some bad news. | Our fundraising has slowed down. If we're going to turn out voters in the final 24 hours of this runoff, we've got to crank things up. It's now or never. Fellow American, The runoff election is less than 24 hours away. We are trying to make every hour count, but our fundraising numbers aren't where they should be. We always knew that Raphael Warnock would outraise us - even in the runoff, but the financial gap continues to grow. Senator Warnock has raised over $153 million and is on track to break all fundraising records in American history. We're in the turnout phase of the campaign, so missing a fundraising goal means that we don't have the money to invest in our ground game for the final hours of this runoff. Fellow American, I know the number of emails and text messages we send can be annoying, but they are the backbone of our fundraising program. When you don't respond and we miss our fundraising goal, our entire campaign suffers. If we don't properly fund our voter turnout operation, we're going to lose. It's now or never. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Josh Shapiro, Governor-Elect
subject: The big fights ahead
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
I will be a Governor you can count on to get things done. Throughout my career, I’ve taken on the status quo, brought people together, and fought to deliver real results for Pennsylvanians — and that’s exactly what I’ll do as Governor.

Derek, I humbly write to you as your Governor-Elect knowing that we won this fight and met this moment like never before. But I want you to know — the job is not done. The task is not complete. With our feet firmly planted on the strong foundation of our democracy, our hearts more open than they were at the start of this campaign, and our eyes looking ahead, we begin to work together to move this Commonwealth forward. Pennsylvania, we showed how to build a coalition to take on the big fights for the people of Pennsylvania. As we move into the transition between campaign and our administration, we begin the hard work of building a coalition to lead this Commonwealth and move us forward. I am profoundly grateful for this honor. I will be a Governor you can count on to get things done. Throughout my career, I’ve taken on the status quo, brought people together, and fought to deliver real results for Pennsylvanians — and that’s exactly what I’ll do as Governor. **[The campaign is over and now it’s up to us to work on the issues facing Pennsylvanians each and every day. I know that you’ve always had my back – and I’ll always have yours. Derek, will you chip in any amount to help us continue to take on these big fights?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55599591/382188843/-33087699?refcode=email_120522_bigfights_allactives&amount=5&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&refcode2=0faecf19-0075-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmFlY2YxOS0wMDc1LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bGTFD0npLKyjFgd-fC2AQ9icMYnZOXyxgydNgYJc6fY=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55599592/382188850/-33087699?refcode=email_120522_bigfights_allactives&amount=5&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&express_lane=true&refcode2=0faecf19-0075-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmFlY2YxOS0wMDc1LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bGTFD0npLKyjFgd-fC2AQ9icMYnZOXyxgydNgYJc6fY=)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Herschel Walker is only one among many of Donald Trump’s friends who’ve spouted horrible, anti-Semitic remarks. Walker is only one among many extremist candidates promoting hate in public discourse that Donald Trump has campaigned for. It would be dangerous for all our families for another of Trump’s awful friends to hold a Senate seat. We’re asking everyone to do all they can to prevent that, and re-elect Sen. Warnock.
body:
Georgia’s ‘Kanye West’

| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. | | | | | Peter, **_The week before Kanye West praised Nazis in an interview with Alex Jones, he had dinner with Donald Trump and a self-declared neo-Nazi. These are the kinds of friends Trump has, and we don’t think he’s trying to convince them of the error of their ways._** _**Trump is also a close friend, political mentor and supporter of Herschel Walker's, who's made numerous despicably anti-Semitic remarks. Trump has repeatedly campaigned for Walker in Georgia’s critical Senate race.**_ | [**_$5. $10. $25. These are the kinds of donations that could make the difference between six more years of Senator Raphael Warnock ... or Senator-elect Herschel Walker. The December 6th runoff election matters to the whole country._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8c2a27ad-430e-4733-9efa-a2fd4452b4b9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**Walker's election would further mainstream fringe figures who hold racist, misogynist, anti-gay and anti-Semitic views. It'****s becoming a dangerous threat to inspire more violence, of the kind we've seen most recently in Colorado Springs.**_ **_WALKER’S BRAND OF EXTREMISM PUTS ALL OF OUR FAMILIES IN DANGER._**
---

|
---

---
| | **_We beat back many of the radicalized figures that Trump elevated from the fringes of US politics in November, candidates such as Kari Lake, Doug Mastriano and Tudor Dixon, to elect Democrats devoted to equality. Now we must do the same to Herschel Walker, so we can keep yet another Democrat, Raphael Warnock, in office, pushing for our goal of full equality for all._** [**_Will you join us in sending Senator Warnock $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to keep Senator Warnock in office and stop hate from having yet another representative in the Senate?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T430ca7ac-955e-41d7-9a68-2d3108ec9451/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Thank you for caring about ALL Americans.**

name: Warnock, Raphael
subject: I'm so grateful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Friend – after I reached out to this grassroots team, thousands of folks stepped up to rush their urgent support. I'm so grateful. If we keep this up, we'll be able to spread our bold message to Georgians in every corner of our state.
---
But my team just showed me the latest numbers, and we're on track to fall just short of our midnight fundraising goal. We need one more push to close this budget gap – so I'm personally asking:
Please, will you chip in $5 or more now to help power our reelection campaign to victory? Here's the best link to donate: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email-2022-q4](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55585736/382140725/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5250-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjkxNzA2Ny1kNzc0LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qbWcroSvZhON07awHLhoQZ-z2UGiy2H3QYW-b3VyuwA=)**
Winning this race in Georgia won't be easy – but I draw strength from folks like you who pitch in at important moments like this. Thank you.
– Raphael
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Sen. Warnock**
Subject: I can't wait to share this with you
| | |

Friend, the results from the general election showed me narrowly leading my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker.
But with the runoff officially underway and the entire GOP establishment behind Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate grassroots support. **That's why I'm urgently asking:** [Will you give $5 or more before midnight to win in Georgia and hit our midnight fundraising goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55585737/382140726/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5250-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjkxNzA2Ny1kNzc0LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qbWcroSvZhON07awHLhoQZ-z2UGiy2H3QYW-b3VyuwA=)

**I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win – but with national Republicans _all-in_ to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a second. ****We've set a $250,000 midnight fundraising goal so we can fight back against GOP attacks and keep up our momentum – but we're falling dangerously short, and I need your help.**
**[Please, friend, will you rush a donation of $5 or more now so we can stay ahead, win in Georgia, and defend this Senate seat?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55585738/382140727/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5250-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjkxNzA2Ny1kNzc0LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qbWcroSvZhON07awHLhoQZ-z2UGiy2H3QYW-b3VyuwA=)**

Thank you for all that you do.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock
**Please read on for a personal message from Sen. Rev. Raphael Warnock:** Friend – thank you. I'm grateful to have grassroots folks like you standing alongside me in our critical fights for justice. But now, we're in a runoff election against Donald Trump's handpicked candidate – and I need your help to win.

Our entire Democratic agenda – from protecting voting rights to restoring reproductive freedom – is on the line in this race. That's why Mitch McConnell and his GOP allies are flooding Georgia with millions to defeat me. We need to fight back now – but I don't take a dime from corporate PACs, so I'm fully relying on your grassroots support to power this campaign to victory.

If you're with me, _[ **please donate now to defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55585743/382140732/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5250-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjkxNzA2Ny1kNzc0LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qbWcroSvZhON07awHLhoQZ-z2UGiy2H3QYW-b3VyuwA=)_. clean_body: Friend – after I reached out to this grassroots team, thousands of folks stepped up to rush their urgent support. I'm so grateful. If we keep this up, we'll be able to spread our bold message to Georgians in every corner of our state. But my team just showed me the latest numbers, and we're on track to fall just short of our midnight fundraising goal. We need one more push to close this budget gap – so I'm personally asking: Please, will you chip in $5 or more now to help power our reelection campaign to victory? Here's the best link to donate: = Winning this race in Georgia won't be easy – but I draw strength from folks like you who pitch in at important moments like this. Thank you. – Raphael \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Sen. Warnock Subject: I can't wait to share this with you | | | Friend, the results from the general election showed me narrowly leading my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker. But with the runoff officially underway and the entire GOP establishment behind Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate grassroots support. That's why I'm urgently asking: = Election experts just confirmed what we've known for months: Our race will be decided by a razor-thin margin. That's why GOP donors are rushing our race with over $58 million – and why Mitch McConnell's super PAC is launching attack ads during this critical stretch. I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win – but with national Republicans all-in to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a second. We've set a $250,000 midnight fundraising goal so we can fight back against GOP attacks and keep up our momentum – but we're falling dangerously short, and I need your help. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for all that you do. – Rev. Raphael Warnock Please read on for a personal message from Sen. Rev. Raphael Warnock: Friend – thank you. I'm grateful to have grassroots folks like you standing alongside me in our critical fights for justice. But now, we're in a runoff election against Donald Trump's handpicked candidate – and I need your help to win. Our entire Democratic agenda – from protecting voting rights to restoring reproductive freedom – is on the line in this race. That's why Mitch McConnell and his GOP allies are flooding Georgia with millions to defeat me. We need to fight back now – but I don't take a dime from corporate PACs, so I'm fully relying on your grassroots support to power this campaign to victory. If you're with me, =_. If you'd like to become one of my TOP supporters and receive exclusive updates from our campaign team, text "GEORGIA" to 52005. body:
I have some bad news. |

---
**Our fundraising has slowed down. If we're going to turn out voters in the final 24 hours of this runoff, we've got to crank things up. It's now or never.**
Fellow American,

The runoff election is less than 24 hours away.

We are trying to make every hour count, **but our fundraising numbers aren't where they should be.**

We always knew that Raphael Warnock would outraise us - even in the runoff, but the financial gap continues to grow.

**Senator Warnock has raised over $153 million and is on track to break all fundraising records in American history.**

We're in the turnout phase of the campaign, so missing a fundraising goal means that we don't have the money to invest in our ground game for the final hours of this runoff.

[** Help our Ground Game!
Chip in $5 -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2a47323b66134208803d84f9651b79e5&_e=FR3U9tRlDo6LtO2Q7KWlR1nJZyQmNZryfGrBQxICMzZfX3DAj9z0ZrIhV7srBo3kwQvmoXmBOqd62l5DUnB-j_N_fR-oFLf1Soij8SZo8vmql6etfHiQeBrXY4iMlWfmdvQfZsKkkMCxXsTtrLTzroXkicNkYrQlvNQRrfpmHMEE-iwloxeix5ou9qL1ZrD6AziRBqEOtqpcQT8308sW2gysJJQjZlRKUV3NsMZ8GUaiw8WsCusZ_lqLbScMqK94_Hj8Y6XJof3sbRkl83leS6Jchm6S7MvOmJ2oFRQ222aW6PcgHneXTAsUM34Ht9O0fyg5_00Iw5KyttT4dqK4jA2qFECQSLHmI_sycx9eWNtuMvHzTg2hLU_blkfMvpuqOSzkYvKAB13_TK8J3y060wKF9TY-zA-kpFgVmy1IfrM%3D)
Fellow American, I know the number of emails and text messages we send can be annoying, but they are the backbone of our fundraising program. When you don't respond and we miss our fundraising goal, _our entire campaign suffers._

**If we don't properly fund our voter turnout operation, we're going to lose.**

**[I am counting on you to help make sure we have the funds we need to win this thing tomorrow! Please chip in $5 or more to help our ground game.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2a47323b66134208803d84f9651b79e5&_e=FR3U9tRlDo6LtO2Q7KWlR1nJZyQmNZryfGrBQxICMzZfX3DAj9z0ZrIhV7srBo3kwQvmoXmBOqd62l5DUnB-j_N_fR-oFLf1Soij8SZo8vmql6etfHiQeBrXY4iMlWfmdvQfZsKkkMCxXsTtrLTzroXkicNkYrQlvNQRrfpmHMEE-iwloxeix5ou9qL1ZrD6AziRBqEOtqpcQT8308sW2gysJJQjZlRKUV3NsMZ8GUaiw8WsCusZ_lqLbScMqK94_Hj8Y6XJof3sbRkl83leS09E12kZAmaS_rik0lYt7sdcbJnLkls_OTXHTC5w2l6g-E67oITGS8OHnq03cVALkh0d_UksaRB4psPglMcY__HXNYI-JS_lUG6vBViSPHIHJ4J3MLSToTn585ThILLPo1v1LrDrefrF1i9PR600WzQ%3D)**

**It's now or never.**

clean_body: I have some bad news. | Our fundraising has slowed down. If we're going to turn out voters in the final 24 hours of this runoff, we've got to crank things up. It's now or never. Fellow American, The runoff election is less than 24 hours away. We are trying to make every hour count, but our fundraising numbers aren't where they should be. We always knew that Raphael Warnock would outraise us - even in the runoff, but the financial gap continues to grow. Senator Warnock has raised over $153 million and is on track to break all fundraising records in American history. We're in the turnout phase of the campaign, so missing a fundraising goal means that we don't have the money to invest in our ground game for the final hours of this runoff. Fellow American, I know the number of emails and text messages we send can be annoying, but they are the backbone of our fundraising program. When you don't respond and we miss our fundraising goal, our entire campaign suffers. If we don't properly fund our voter turnout operation, we're going to lose. It's now or never. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: =?utf-8?Q?Supervisor=20David=20Canepa?=
subject: Join Us This Saturday in Daly City at Classic Bowling Center for our Fourth Annual Bowl-a-Thon and Toy Drive, 2 p.m. to 5 p.m.
body:
Fourth Annual Bowl-a-Thon and Toy Drive, 2 p.m. to 5 p.m., Saturday, December 10 at Classic Bowling Center, 900 King Drive in Daly City. | | | |
---
| | |
# Join us this Saturday for Bowling in Daly City!

---
|
---
|
---
|
#### **Fourth annual Bowl-a-Thon and Toy Drive **
---
| After a two-year hiatus due to COVID, I’m delighted to invite you to join me and some of my best friends as we host the Fourth Annual Bowl-a-Thon and Toy Drive, 2 p.m. to 5 p.m., Saturday, December 10 at Classic Bowling Center, 900 King Drive in Daly City. Donate a new unwrapped toy and bowl for free. The event is cosponsored by my friend Keith Okada, who goes by Keith O, a world-class DJ and bowler who has been a fixture at Classic Bowling for 20 years now.
---
This is such a fun day to relax and have fun and to get your competitive juices flowing playing some ten-pin. Most importantly, though, it is a way to bring some joy to children in need during the holidays. Thank you to our partner Classic Bowling Center which has become a community gathering place for Daly City residents and hosts generations of family members. Hope to see you there!

To RSVP, contact Mike on my staff: [mrichardson@smcgov.org](mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org)[ ](mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org?subject=Bowl-a-Thon%20and%20Toy%20Drive%20this%20Saturday%20in%20Daly%20City)or text: 415-845-1368
---
|
---
|
---
| | |
---
| _Copyright © 2022 Supervisor David Canepa, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Supervisor David Canepa1618 Sullivan497Daly City, CA 94015
[Add us to your address book](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&e=c0babbc643&c=88fa6c94a6) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&e=c0babbc643&c=88fa6c94a6).

[](http://www.mailchimp.com/email-referral/?utm_source=freemium_newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=referral_marketing&aid=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&afl=1)

body:
| Peter – I'm fired up!

It is runoff Election Day TOMORROW here in Georgia. Our team is on the ground right now – knocking on doors and mobilizing the voters who will help us keep Georgia blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority.

But we have a problem: Mitch McConnell's super PAC is funneling over $50 million into our state to flood the airwaves with attack ads and elect Herschel Walker. **I'm worried that if we don't fight back ASAP, we could get outspent and drowned out before voters head to the polls.

That's why we set an ambitious $2 million pre-Election Day fundraising goal—so we have the resources we need to spread our pro-Georgia message to voters in this final stretch and win.** But with time running out before this critical deadline, we're not on track to reach our goal.

clean_body: | Peter – I'm fired up! It is runoff Election Day TOMORROW here in Georgia. Our team is on the ground right now – knocking on doors and mobilizing the voters who will help us keep Georgia blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority. But we have a problem: Mitch McConnell's super PAC is funneling over $50 million into our state to flood the airwaves with attack ads and elect Herschel Walker. I'm worried that if we don't fight back ASAP, we could get outspent and drowned out before voters head to the polls. That's why we set an ambitious $2 million pre-Election Day fundraising goal—so we have the resources we need to spread our pro-Georgia message to voters in this final stretch and win. But with time running out before this critical deadline, we're not on track to reach our goal. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Raphael Warnock and Upset the Setup will go through immediately: | = = = = = I'm deeply appreciative of you, Peter – today and every day. Let's go win this thing! – Rev. clean_body: I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win -- but with national Republicans all in to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a second. | | Derek, I’ll keep this quick: My runoff election against Herschel Walker is tomorrow and national Republicans have spent millions of dollars to defeat our campaign. With all signs pointing to a tight race, we're running out of time to raise the funds we need to power our campaign to victory. Will you split a $10 donation between my campaign and the DNC ahead of tomorrow’s runoff election? I believe that, at the end of the day, the people of Georgia are going to send me back to the Senate. But Derek, my opponent and the GOP will do all they can to try to get a win. I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win -- but with national Republicans all in to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a second. With less than 24 hours until polls open, I need the full support of this grassroots team. Thank you for all that you do. Raphael Sen. Raphael Warnock U.S. Senator, Georgia When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit Democratic Senator Raphael Warnock -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come. If you no longer wish to receive these emails, you can to stop receiving these emails. Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, . name: Jay Inslee
subject: Humbly asking
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Will you help me beat the freeze?

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/RaxXspAV6Zta/Yit3dnVOcEw5SGhzT3ZvUmN1N2x5MkFhSWcvRU5kSVRwNG9Fb0RVK2xFRXI1U01nbXo1SVZudU5mTUowY3A2eHVjMFY2M3djcWlJbW5PYWR4WXRYZzdzc091cC9wWW5rOHhFWHBoRHQxT2M9S0/UGIxUEt5NHNQV0p4alpWY1BZN3UxTTE3dmU2cG9LK2hxZ1NJdmpWNlZpVT0S1) Friend, At midnight this Friday, I'll stop fundraising for months as Washington state's legislative fundraising freeze begins. I have a long list of priorities for this session, from fighting the climate crisis to continuing to tackle homelessness here in Washington state. **At the top of that list is enshrining the right to choose into our state 's constitution.** But while our fundraising efforts are frozen, far-right anti-choice groups can raise and spend millions in an all-out-attack on reproductive rights here in Washington. We can't afford to be caught flat-footed. So, our team has set a bold fundraising goal: $50,000 before the freeze, this Friday at midnight. [_**Ahead of this crucial deadline, I 'm humbly asking: Will you make a contribution of $10 right now, so we can hit our $50,000 Beat the Freeze goal, protect reproductive rights, and keep moving Washington state forward?**_](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/baPjsYxm26H0/Yit3dnVOcEw5SGhzT3ZvUmN1N2x5MkFhSWcvRU5kSVRwNG9Fb0RVK2xFRXI1U01nbXo1SVZudU5mTUowY3A2eHVjMFY2M3djcWlJbW5PYWR4WXRYZzdzc091cC9wWW5rOHhFWHBoRHQxT2M9S0/UGIxUEt5NHNQV0p4alpWY1BZN3UxTTE3dmU2cG9LK2hxZ1NJdmpWNlZpVT0S1) [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/baPjsYxm26H0/Yit3dnVOcEw5SGhzT3ZvUmN1N2x5MkFhSWcvRU5kSVRwNG9Fb0RVK2xFRXI1U01nbXo1SVZudU5mTUowY3A2eHVjMFY2M3djcWlJbW5PYWR4WXRYZzdzc091cC9wWW5rOHhFWHBoRHQxT2M9S0/UGIxUEt5NHNQV0p4alpWY1BZN3UxTTE3dmU2cG9LK2hxZ1NJdmpWNlZpVT0S1) | [CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/erqjJ43VgacK/Yit3dnVOcEw5SGhzT3ZvUmN1N2x5MkFhSWcvRU5kSVRwNG9Fb0RVK2xFRXI1U01nbXo1SVZudU5mTUowY3A2eHVjMFY2M3djcWlJbW5PYWR4WXRYZzdzc091cC9wWW5rOHhFWHBoRHQxT2M9S0/UGIxUEt5NHNQV0p4alpWY1BZN3UxTTE3dmU2cG9LK2hxZ1NJdmpWNlZpVT0S1)
---
To be crystal clear: Washington state's fundraising freeze isn't a bad thing. Elected officials, myself included, should be focused on what we got elected to do: passing laws that protect and improve the lives of all Washingtonians.
But while we dedicate this legislative session to making progress in our state, far-right groups can raise and spend millions of dollars lying to the people of Washington and try to stop us from doing our jobs. And make no mistake, they've been successful halting pro-choice legislation in states even more blue than Washington.
All the while, we can't raise a penny.
So, here's the situation: To have the resources on-hand needed to get this done in the face of the outrageous out-of-state attacks we know are coming, we've got to raise $50,000 before Friday. It's just our unfortunate reality this winter.
[_**Please, I 'm asking you directly: Chip in $10 today toward our $50,000 goal, so we can hit our Beat the Freeze goal together.**_](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/baPjsYxm26H0/Yit3dnVOcEw5SGhzT3ZvUmN1N2x5MkFhSWcvRU5kSVRwNG9Fb0RVK2xFRXI1U01nbXo1SVZudU5mTUowY3A2eHVjMFY2M3djcWlJbW5PYWR4WXRYZzdzc091cC9wWW5rOHhFWHBoRHQxT2M9S0/UGIxUEt5NHNQV0p4alpWY1BZN3UxTTE3dmU2cG9LK2hxZ1NJdmpWNlZpVT0S1)
As always, I am so grateful for your support.
Very truly yours,
Jay
[CONTRIBUTE](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/erqjJ43VgacK/Yit3dnVOcEw5SGhzT3ZvUmN1N2x5MkFhSWcvRU5kSVRwNG9Fb0RVK2xFRXI1U01nbXo1SVZudU5mTUowY3A2eHVjMFY2M3djcWlJbW5PYWR4WXRYZzdzc091cC9wWW5rOHhFWHBoRHQxT2M9S0/UGIxUEt5NHNQV0p4alpWY1BZN3UxTTE3dmU2cG9LK2hxZ1NJdmpWNlZpVT0S1)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?m=21651345&r=NjM1MTU5NDU3MzQ5S0&j=MjUwMDMyMDM4MAS2&l=12552697&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). Hakeem Jeffries will stop at **NOTHING** to push Joe Biden's failed policy agenda that has crushed our economy, created a wide-open southern border, and weakened America on the world stage. ❌ Jeffries claimed Republicans **cheated** in the 2016 presidential election.
❌ Jeffries called for **“war** ” amid Amy Coney Barrett’s Supreme Court nomination.
❌ Jeffries supports **abortion-on-demand until birth** with no limits.
❌ Jeffries believes border walls are **“immoral.”**
❌ Jeffries supports **amnesty** for illegal immigrant gang members and rapists.
❌ Jeffries “fully” supports letting **non-citizens vote.**
❌ Jeffries said Biden’s withdrawal from Afghanistan was an **“extraordinary accomplishment.” **
❌ Jeffries praises Biden's **anti-American energy** agenda.

subject: You helped us defy all the odds
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Earlier this year, with your help, we re-elected a Democratic Senate that will fight alongside Joe and Kamala and deliver for all Americans.

Now, we have an incredible opportunity to _expand_ our majority by re-electing Raphael Warnock and making him our 51st Democratic senator.

**[Keeping Georgia blue will affect our majority for years to come. Can I count on you to chip in $5 now to help the DSCC fight for our Democratic Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/10052?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221205-JillBiden-JillBidenSigned-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221205-JillBiden-JillBidenSigned-Pros-sl1&akid=9130%2E9716520%2EiqNPnU)**

If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

---

In the past two years, Joe and Kamala have done so much to help American families. That wouldn’t have been possible without the help of strong leaders like Senator Warnock. Now, he needs _our_ help.

Defending this seat won't be easy. It's going to take another history-making effort – but we did it just two years ago and we can do it again.

**The runoff is tomorrow, and as Joe likes to say, there's nothing we can't accomplish when we do it together. We're counting on you to dig deep and keep Georgia blue.**

**[Let's re-elect Democrats like Sen. Warnock and expand our Senate majority for years to come. If you can, chip in $5 now to fight for our Democratic Senate>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/10052?amount=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221205-JillBiden-JillBidenSigned-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221205-JillBiden-JillBidenSigned-Pros-sl1&akid=9130%2E9716520%2EiqNPnU)**

Joe and I are so grateful for your support each and every day.

Thank you,

Jill

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/10052?amount=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221205-JillBiden-JillBidenSigned-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221205-JillBiden-JillBidenSigned-Pros-sl1&akid=9130%2E9716520%2EiqNPnU)

subject: Giving just $5 means more votes for Warnock.
body:
We need Warnock. | | | | | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yA3tVaxbrjmEeQD3IRPUq_fn2toJ9AnieUrwShRJCcxSdwuuS6nKv4fLaRBqMSdN6opmNzdDY-hp0g0DfIXlWaMHP_DpQ6nBCtpQ5EgSJlN93lFGyCz1LsVOvJFmjjEYMcjV-SYMF6mknI8iO4y61wL09NMxESHfp6Qr0bbx3Fdxgn4zqCgBbmvvu0Wjyp0sgsho8gSpWnnx9ZF_xq7Ufi8tiCoxgHO7IMbUoFw-otbqKs5HSRCnrRXZaViYlSLvxX39ORvz76YIv-A0KbzZPXu70nmsk5Lfqkdp1fU7lausXqHDV7HgcxzHSrWoZZarP1Cf28WD4zFfikwp-mVepaWW1-WyMG8nC7r9yCyoXLCIe-UfkuHTcajL7DbDIjkrA/3rq/nLgiAcD9SEedMP3dVmYkBA/h0/0bABo4MjkzVTOWkEMgDrW5oFXnwG8C57MEpWt2e2NME)

Derek,
**We need Warnock. Plain and simple.**
Senator Warnock is exemplifies the kind of leadership we need in the senate. He knows that we need to protect social, environmental, economic, and reproductive justice right here, right now. And we're fighting to get him re-elected like our futures depend on it. Because they do.

[DONATE $$$ NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zNra5tIr9qXBOFThEXgvzdEIjenHbjYHoJrelfzIM04OU98raJYWgERx2KxaW-xUOoKcTJ_Juwo04tcXJ3dYWyDbrPX90VnBHoIpdw0VA24Gg3G0M8dnOIIxV5mhMnfnp81ButdeXA2mMC-Cw8YUkbH5ThgeJH9pQqmDah-LpvQhCkI2i8VUA1fPYqdzFHxGDHJiMx9EblgxKlhIj2GcoACMddWy2nesjjpyPUJUC5ja2MKAdAwr27pLwD440VXSaXs5jeSY6hhmnpBCEE6gQJNLmyQZlczX4cHMu-3vwgc6qRzlZmaZNmUIj1LI0datGuz0CySZJ3rhsZq_CFn3aRQTul16V5M7OJuwZ5mgIYOg/3rq/nLgiAcD9SEedMP3dVmYkBA/h1/ZgDdeMrlMzW_iLoJSWzlAPkS_jIEhAHUyOX1ol-Bt8M)
Reverend Warnock is committed to fighting for our country, our democracy, and our planet. He puts the emphasis on what's right and just, not just what big donors tell him to say. So we need every young person to get out there and vote tomorrow. And that's why we need your help.

[Your financial support today will mean more young people getting to the poles tomorrow. We are investing in youth organizing and the youth vote every day because we believe our generation will make the difference. If you believe in us, invest in us. Can you chip in $5, $25, or $50 right now so we can stop the Red Wave and Re-Elect Raphael?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zNra5tIr9qXBOFThEXgvzdEIjenHbjYHoJrelfzIM04NhV-TcJm5n50CePWEesus9SdeheHx9uibP4Wh3ZtDfURbQa9W5gngxN3aS61LKV89nClA-_U3i2YDtMFWTRUw3vJRcGvORntCVVAs-ddCss8FSWLIbmJTuwCRnNJnXnD86XqT9WFHEcORunuNN9l9p2gb0D0UqbB79F73LKnjaptu72Sa6eoZOlfdWaBJt2mDNPYSltOt8q2hskA1ECA5aULYgr_E1WGpwmcrMFl74V5TJU8UPFHDWSXbQmoVI93VW4lZI7RcK9h0Ynwtz2VVALNvoN9p9RGns5088FK41KMiZKwjhlMY6IJ-kHPNRrtA/3rq/nLgiAcD9SEedMP3dVmYkBA/h2/q4wUbGc6rwzVTv2i9jSWpiEM2DKcHmF3VuoNP8P-0w8)

clean_body: We need Warnock. | | | | | | Derek, We need Warnock. Plain and simple. Senator Warnock is exemplifies the kind of leadership we need in the senate. He knows that we need to protect social, environmental, economic, and reproductive justice right here, right now. And we're fighting to get him re-elected like our futures depend on it. Because they do. Reverend Warnock is committed to fighting for our country, our democracy, and our planet. He puts the emphasis on what's right and just, not just what big donors tell him to say. So we need every young person to get out there and vote tomorrow. And that's why we need your help. Respectfully, Quentin Wathum-Ocama President, YDA | The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. name: Raphael Warnock
subject: Georgians are heading to the polls
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
I'm worried that if we don't fight back ASAP, we could get outspent and drowned out before voters head to the polls.

| I'm fired up!

It is runoff Election Day TOMORROW here in Georgia. Our team is on the ground right now – knocking on doors and mobilizing the voters who will help us keep Georgia blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority.

But we have a problem: Mitch McConnell's super PAC is funneling over $50 million into our state to flood the airwaves with attack ads and elect Herschel Walker. **I'm worried that if we don't fight back ASAP, we could get outspent and drowned out before voters head to the polls.**

**That's why we set an ambitious $2 million fundraising goal—so we have the resources we need to spread our pro-Georgia message to voters in this final stretch and win.** But with time running out before this critical deadline, we're not on track to reach our goal.

[_**So, I'm personally asking: Will you split $10 or more right now between me and Fight for Progress to help us hit our final fundraising goal, reach more voters, and keep Georgia blue?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55595965/382155405/1635673157?refcode=BLU-FFP-20221205-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMxZjUwNWIyLWU2NzQtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=l2KDL3BWkwsB3tHdZn_oIVGIIluFPyFxUPlikTJwUU4=)

name: Team Evergreen
subject: Help prevent a 30-year nightmare [SIGN ON]
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
We need you to contribute to this momentum.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-Biden-shut-down-willow-letter-video/?utm_source=ema_2022-12-05_willow_vido_letter_bump_&source=ema_2022-12-05_willow_vido_letter_bump_&t=2&akid=13134%2E53494%2Et-HLhn) Friend, When our colleagues Hannah and Mattea got together to make a video about the disastrous Willow oil drilling project, we hoped it would inspire thousands of folks to take action. Specifically, we had set a goal of sending 25,000 letters. Hitting that goal would ensure we catch the Biden administration's eye at a critical moment. So we're thrilled to announce that our video has already racked up over **45,000 views across YouTube, Twitter and other channels** , caught the attention of the climate movement's top influencers, and inspired **nearly 17,000 letters** so far! The response to this video has been incredible, but we're not over the finish line yet. We need advocates like you to contribute to this momentum and help prevent a 30-year fossil fuel nightmare. [_**Sign your name now (and watch the video if you missed it)!**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-Biden-shut-down-willow-letter-video/?utm_source=ema_2022-12-05_willow_vido_letter_bump_&source=ema_2022-12-05_willow_vido_letter_bump_&t=3&akid=13134%2E53494%2Et-HLhn) | [WATCH + SIGN](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-Biden-shut-down-willow-letter-video/?utm_source=ema_2022-12-05_willow_vido_letter_bump_&source=ema_2022-12-05_willow_vido_letter_bump_&t=4&akid=13134%2E53494%2Et-HLhn)
---
—Team Evergreen
\------ Forwarded message ------
From: **Mattea Mrkusic**
Date: Thu, Nov 17, 2022
Subject:[WATCH] How we can kill the Willow project
Friend,
[_**My colleague Hannah called me up the other day with some questions about the Willow project—and the answers blew her mind. Watch our conversation, then sign our petition calling on President Biden and the Bureau of Land Management to reject this project!**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-Biden-shut-down-willow-letter-video/?utm_source=ema_2022-12-05_willow_vido_letter_bump_&source=ema_2022-12-05_willow_vido_letter_bump_&t=5&akid=13134%2E53494%2Et-HLhn)
[](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-Biden-shut-down-willow-letter-video/?utm_source=ema_2022-12-05_willow_vido_letter_bump_&source=ema_2022-12-05_willow_vido_letter_bump_&t=6&akid=13134%2E53494%2Et-HLhn)
[WATCH THE VIDEO](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-Biden-shut-down-willow-letter-video/?utm_source=ema_2022-12-05_willow_vido_letter_bump_&source=ema_2022-12-05_willow_vido_letter_bump_&t=7&akid=13134%2E53494%2Et-HLhn)
---
Willow is ConocoPhillips' pet project—a plan to lock us into three decades of destructive drilling in sensitive Arctic ecosystems near Indigenous communities.
The Arctic is already melting _four times faster_ than the rest of the world, and the Willow project could make it so much worse. It would unleash devastating levels of pollution and directly undermine Biden's climate goals.
But there's good news: If Biden rejects the permit, that's it. The project's dead.
**Thousands of people have already called on President Biden to stop the Willow project. Now, we need you.[_Watch and share our video, then tell Biden and his Bureau of Land Management to reject Willow once and for all._](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-Biden-shut-down-willow-letter-video/?utm_source=ema_2022-12-05_willow_vido_letter_bump_&source=ema_2022-12-05_willow_vido_letter_bump_&t=8&akid=13134%2E53494%2Et-HLhn)**
[WATCH + SIGN](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-Biden-shut-down-willow-letter-video/?utm_source=ema_2022-12-05_willow_vido_letter_bump_&source=ema_2022-12-05_willow_vido_letter_bump_&t=9&akid=13134%2E53494%2Et-HLhn)
---
Mattea Mrkusic
Policy Lead, Evergreen Action
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=13134%2E53494%2Et-HLhn). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION

clean_body: We need you to contribute to this momentum. | Friend, When our colleagues Hannah and Mattea got together to make a video about the disastrous Willow oil drilling project, we hoped it would inspire thousands of folks to take action. Specifically, we had set a goal of sending 25,000 letters. Hitting that goal would ensure we catch the Biden administration's eye at a critical moment. So we're thrilled to announce that our video has already racked up over 45,000 views across YouTube, Twitter and other channels , caught the attention of the climate movement's top influencers, and inspired nearly 17,000 letters so far! The response to this video has been incredible, but we're not over the finish line yet. We need advocates like you to contribute to this momentum and help prevent a 30-year fossil fuel nightmare. | —Team Evergreen \------ Forwarded message ------ From: Mattea Mrkusic Date: Thu, Nov 17, 2022 Subject:[WATCH] How we can kill the Willow project Friend, Willow is ConocoPhillips' pet project—a plan to lock us into three decades of destructive drilling in sensitive Arctic ecosystems near Indigenous communities. It would unleash devastating levels of pollution and directly undermine Biden's climate goals. But there's good news: If Biden rejects the permit, that's it. The project's dead. Thousands of people have already called on President Biden to stop the Willow project. Now, we need you. Mattea Mrkusic Policy Lead, Evergreen Action

We need your support if we’re going to re-elect Sen. Warnock. | | | Tomorrow is the Georgia Senate runoff, Peter. **[With less than 24 hours until polls open, can you rush your last $4 donation to help us turn out the vote?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUdAbF1Bnx_7ZbTj2jeEU1TNCDpsow2xPvQcXZgO33ubSnU8z85YdKHRwslZfCMRWreUwMg65ouO-J5QVkILyEbdoXBQod8OIBx58mTQeB6vfVrJ6-ZGIRdIMQJlhZdomhyvScYFQc6CTZK0NabEAzlhE13uTXpXmZSXdGNF89xVDpwdXBnrvCZBNBIorjjUzKOCSwshIKJQii85u0OuEqrj-zaSagaL7M2N3vJf-9Ov2lJKFv4K5pAyOyMfNAqxGhhp-nmAU8RvmU4LS49ls4mLFsombRo09cpuT49hBWE_w/3rq/DnsX28OHSXa6bkMfnHYimg/h0/aek3Z5VsvnegHi5n6TUkA-OIxv6vWOOKGiVuGflLhu0)** **[Donate $4 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUdAbF1Bnx_7ZbTj2jeEU1TNCDpsow2xPvQcXZgO33ubSnU8z85YdKHRwslZfCMRWrPcY6C9V5UgXmBxKJVHaeHWST3PMJtD6FN_hUWrR8JuLyB64aWjucG1acXtYpBhPmLtD3_f-c3fvSSnU8tR0gCE2Y0zoDp2nbvsUOOxrvtQneLWqSIZWRwkklKtWuXeHUI3ZHK8ExEif7s-g1uO-bglTmFEsW1BAVpWfpB0wOGDcW10-cweQj7EFMiFjPclFyLNl0ZBDZET9J8TCnWTG5okR2X2aU_w90qAUljsHlWY8/3rq/DnsX28OHSXa6bkMfnHYimg/h1/UkzlEACmJR3viGwnkSJ93dFVWAZtN9KAKqYY9eG4sJA)** If we’re going to send Sen. We have broken records with our organizing efforts in Georgia this year — including sending 1.4 _million_ texts in just two hours. subject: Tomorrow is the big day! Can we come together and help Raphael Warnock find the support to win re-election in this very close, historic Senate race?
body:
Final stretch

| | |

| | | | | Peter, We have almost reached the end--and we're getting excited to re-elect Senator Warnock, defying history by picking up a Senate seat during an off year election for the party in the White House!! **BUT!...We just heard from the Senator, who shared:** | _**...my team just showed me the latest numbers, and we're on track to fall just short of our midnight fundraising goal. We need one more push to close this budget gap – so I'm personally asking:**_

We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. name: Katie Porter
subject: NEW: Investigating bribery in the Trump Admin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/12?t=1&akid=15525%2E3422442%2EQ1FCsL)
Derek, last week I sent a letter to the Department of the Interior requesting documents that could reveal **another incident of bribery between senior Trump Administration officials and a real estate developer.**
We came across this potential incident of bribery while investigating a separate quid pro quo scheme involving the Trump Administration and a developer. In May, my colleague Rep. Grijalva and I spearheaded an investigation that revealed how Trump officials overruled local authority to start a development project near an endangered river— _after the developer and his friends made a quarter of a million dollars worth of campaign donations._
**Our investigation led to a criminal referral for bribery.**
Cleaning up corruption is one of my main goals in Congress. Thanks to your support, I’ll continue this important work of holding power to account.
Katie Porter
**[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/13991?refcode=EMAE05_TRU_20221205_V1_F&t=2&akid=15525%2E3422442%2EQ1FCsL)**

Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to update your information, please **[click here.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/em-update-info-footer/?t=3&akid=15525%2E3422442%2EQ1FCsL)** Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters chipping in to emails just like this one. If you would like to receive fewer emails, please [**click here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=15525%2E3422442%2EQ1FCsL).

To contribute via check, please address to: Katie Porter for Congress, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

| | Hello Waltz Warriors! We hope this email finds you and your families healthy and safe in the new year! From discussing COVID lockdowns in China, CCP censorship, and the weakness of the Biden Administration, here’s just some of what Mike has been up to this past week.
---
|
---
**In the News****WALTZ ON CHINA COVID LOCKDOWNS** Last Monday, Mike Waltz kicked off the week by joining [Fox Business' Kudlow](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=49d4ab16542e4cb6b8384ccc9112a91b&_e=3tR1kTAIkXTTym-Em1aJ48WCFnmbSs7XiND2OjW6MbKt7cBh9-mmtDL-SjuGM5rHhorUEpGGQl-dbpX3V5bWwQvyLHDr10QFh55MVV1E8B1XhTyfi-E1ynlDLZKgEzxFkiBsWddcekCNTmR8dCQsq5o4eCoKUt8DhQTmplOuS43dU8e_d42f42jFjE0iGABKuTF8FWgNX3KG8XdL8Ly_PemJ2lgd_fea1MZLLZgNS5pyjyKRYsGsgIzsKkPTaYyXS6membrxt0Y_jnxOjz1i1NapXCeCXBxh7ValbxCc3mw3aYiC1NPZosYDndB6rLLrG57M1fUMQR0plSrbkRVHLw%3D%3D) to discuss the protests in China over COVID lockdowns and the Biden Administration's weakness. _"Once again, we have a tepid, weak response from this administration. Whether it's China, Cuba, Venezuela, Iran, people crying out for freedom just need to hear that the United States firmly stands with them and that is once again not what we're getting from this White House." _
---
[](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=49d4ab16542e4cb6b8384ccc9112a91b&_e=3tR1kTAIkXTTym-Em1aJ48WCFnmbSs7XiND2OjW6MbKt7cBh9-mmtDL-SjuGM5rHhorUEpGGQl-dbpX3V5bWwQvyLHDr10QFh55MVV1E8B1XhTyfi-E1ynlDLZKgEzxFkiBsWddcekCNTmR8dCQsq5o4eCoKUt8DhQTmplOuS43dU8e_d42f42jFjE0iGABK1uEouUSYVNJyu7qfCTG_s57UJN5vJROOD-y7zIDn5470je2s7BX1sFihbl4sI84VxZgdJGf3YJ5K6jECHT3NzFKokDZp_PBBy1_oL9IOfECyPP4DmbsU2F1ze_xGne7w-ifYRcEMP4ih0hLf8eKtTQ%3D%3D)

**In the News****WALTZ ON PROTESTS IN CHINA** Then on Tuesday, Mike joined Fox Business's Mornings with Maria to further discuss the protests in China. Here's what Mike had to say: _"Protests happen in China, the world just doesn’t know about them because videos don’t normally penetrate the CCP’s firewall. People crying out for freedom must hear the U.S. stands with them. But once again, we’re seeing a timid, weak response from Biden’s White House."_
---

**WALTZ ON MILITARY VACCINE MANDATE** On Thursday, Mike was on [Fox News' Fox & Friends First](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=49d4ab16542e4cb6b8384ccc9112a91b&_e=3tR1kTAIkXTTym-Em1aJ49Nw-NH4jOzXMubEPbFSkbYFcN90oclPldw0wKP8XaBwNV792j7WhgTuPEIY4Et5Q9l4r2KejeIYYWHGUlUxKZzeVl0UNFMPiNtd4v5wUtiUGQX0dUh4EZTiT2aMXCbXKDobqQ5NpiK1L6FqlBMbL9uVvPGgc8IHy-qN_JmMNPC0-GelJVpOAyYBrHhYozl3C_EhTUiKrKq7HnsAzjouPhSQPhH2ntPiemVvcRxGi7jcXUWQ2aNHjoHlptdKKRq3yKYIr1Rds2uoZ2lb4cGGyoffP7aIe-3Wt_LcZ9hyWdob) to discuss COVID lockdown protests in China, Biden’s upcoming meeting with French President Macron, and the Naval Academy allegedly preventing unvaccinated graduates from getting diplomas. _"This military mandate has got to stop. The vaccine does not stop the spread. We are in a recruiting crisis that it is going to take us years to get out of, and the Pentagon is on the verge of discharging nearly 20,000 at a time where we're seeing a massive military buildup from China. "_

clean_body: | | | | | Hello Waltz Warriors! We hope this email finds you and your families healthy and safe in the new year! From discussing COVID lockdowns in China, CCP censorship, and the weakness of the Biden Administration, here’s just some of what Mike has been up to this past week. | In the NewsWALTZ ON CHINA COVID LOCKDOWNS Last Monday, Mike Waltz kicked off the week by joining to discuss the protests in China over COVID lockdowns and the Biden Administration's weakness. "Once again, we have a tepid, weak response from this administration. Whether it's China, Cuba, Venezuela, Iran, people crying out for freedom just need to hear that the United States firmly stands with them and that is once again not what we're getting from this White House." Watch the entire interview for yourself In the NewsWALTZ ON PROTESTS IN CHINA Then on Tuesday, Mike joined Fox Business's Mornings with Maria to further discuss the protests in China. Here's what Mike had to say: "Protests happen in China, the world just doesn’t know about them because videos don’t normally penetrate the CCP’s firewall. People crying out for freedom must hear the U.S. stands with them. But once again, we’re seeing a timid, weak response from Biden’s White House." Watch the Fox Business interview WALTZ ON MILITARY VACCINE MANDATE On Thursday, Mike was on to discuss COVID lockdown protests in China, Biden’s upcoming meeting with French President Macron, and the Naval Academy allegedly preventing unvaccinated graduates from getting diplomas. "This military mandate has got to stop. The vaccine does not stop the spread. We are in a recruiting crisis that it is going to take us years to get out of, and the Pentagon is on the verge of discharging nearly 20,000 at a time where we're seeing a massive military buildup from China. " Watch the entire segment WALTZ ON CENSORSHIP Later on Thursday, Mike joined to weigh in on big tech involvement in CCP Censorship. "What level of atrocities will the CCP have to commit for Tim Cook to decouple from China? The blood being spilled in China is on Apple’s balance sheet." Watch the clip . Essential Mission Brief Reading Store Our Online Store is live! If you haven't checked it out yet, . You can find all the Waltz Warriors shirts, hats, stickers, yard signs, and now...koozies! | Social Media Here are a few of our top posts from social media this week. Be sure to like and share, and when you tweet at Mike remember to use #WaltzWarriors! | | | | | | That's it for this week. Thanks for all of you support and stay tuned for more! Be sure to follow Mike on social media! | | ---|--- - | | Paid for by Michael Waltz For Congress | | Michael Waltz is a member of the Army National Guard. body:
Giffords is fighting every day to make sure we pass strong gun laws at the state and federal level. But we cannot do it alone.
#

Friends -
Giffords is fighting every day to make sure we pass strong gun laws at the state and federal level. But we cannot do it alone.
[**Please contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to Giffords PAC TODAY. Strong gun laws save lives, and your support makes it happen.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec22.cgiIvC&refcode=em221205-1-30&t=1&akid=2815%2E3935704%2EVILoz9)
Look at this map:
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec22.cgiIvC&refcode=em221205-1-30&refcode2=2815.3935704.VILoz9&t=2&akid=2815%2E3935704%2EVILoz9)_State grades from the Giffords 2021 Scorecard_
States with the strongest gun laws have some of the lowest levels of gun-violence per capita, regardless of what the NRA and far right tell you.
Saving lives from gun violence is our daily mission. Your donation helps us make it happen, even on the days the issue isn’t in the news. [**Please make today the day you donate whatever you can afford.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec22.cgiIvC&refcode=em221205-1-30&t=3&akid=2815%2E3935704%2EVILoz9)

name: Obama Alert (via DLCC.org)
subject: Open for an important message from President Barack Obama
body:
President Obama is using his voice to echo the importance of state legislatures. | | |
---
| | **President Obama is using his voice to amplify the critical importance of state legislatures:** [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xP1bRbO086_ZX-9NTtP6aHbAwXi1YWzwiVR22BOcczmRl-fvmBUV9csI_lB1Rx3RtRb3XMgbTKqAo2aCH_TWVmOvvbx0GOfusB60yrJzxVpU3KzOjxF8TTqx1X0p38-MhzBg0hLM5C7MyDOdhter2crcU_HXnY5Z8VChIvAg1KHo1MSEW-HmlIa1VeIhqXkUcDltqm6OiKuVDZLBw1tAYSevPIYlleu7ei94-JLcPlUE1aPG0-g4J3aSCkmG4C7Pzo8NeQHw2Y_cDtHMitEnlhw0YGOBxLKWBW9i8POycZxTsbiqf_22PvR8Ew2V2agASTusb8xdGKj-dRto0-Xsp-umgBCy2joWkczTHRWR5J4CUWV7G4RUxrZ2PLfc53wbku3Iuj7rFebNWb8eikq1HRKf8rasekvKvni-UeUQz79w/3rq/BKSZKetyRCaNj-FbXjJqFw/h0/f1HUliEubXSqjp0BCinvhnnziRCdjUMyEIDcftSUXAY) And no one would be better than President Obama – he served THREE terms in the Illinois State Senate! Here’s exactly why he’s so right: **While legislation stalls on the federal level, state legislators are making key decisions about access to abortion, public education, health care services, and even decisions about the roads you drive on.** Where Republicans have stripped their constituents of these rights, state Democrats have protected the right to choose, expanded early and absentee voting, and much, much more. **Simply put, state Democrats are the last line of defense against GOP extremism.** But with must-win special elections in Virginia quickly approaching and seats still up in the air in some states, we need every Democrat reading this to listen to President Obama and step up. Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, [please click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDC1zXjOgMKTq1qg9b7LMk8NY4biyiGBVJXIDelS7m60cKaXwQDfsi6wVlrlpGB5RcgfuIIHe6hd8iOGFvsd6XbH6bPGloasmPsNPOUCpYuDqjrfWXPulk7ACO8jglUSTg6mTV1tEoRQF2LDTn6RXVLMh6vfmXwqE_V_Ern0WE_zXsvllaoOziLwWBpURdTKQZLSMCjaNU2aHDRT-RrHEmgBQ-D3vVi9OmJ-I7lI-CaLSKQ58GSreB4CrMvcfnbbrcZDbATLyBjP9ZOEPYRs4-wY/3rq/iOVW3ByeSbebbjF2csDiyQ/h0/GKmZKqLtRTVDM28LKVLembFmXGHTdP2KoFjvxEPo2Fo) And if you have a moment, please read our message below.
[ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE0Vd8nKqW85ZXV9rlZ14r6UtUEfpxpRFiPOSJMuOc_izw712zDLrtY4gsLC5Yo4Udehl9yRJxgooCe6spx2KZL0IdX8PrOMYluDdW7FgM8LYxI3pEKmhrp7WdpiXo7MmBefsi5hmh9qc5rSVnxcte-5CWZ9wT2kg7VItuC0q0hXiGmEa2jadhm0ifU-kAFb4NUdpfXgs8szH-0Xg834JR26Mm0s0jAKON4iZdqqihX3tjBsylBNjdHchbk3qdJi5Ud1xEooQXAmZC8kAREvFnp6QSOGCbxbeu13nc3hjVfSKL9HE9GSbXcwGUO-NzHRSJ2ZknjUGfU40zVzZYfNlt-Wd2i4I2zzoOuWGCk_clcCA1E5yN2-AE1G97k4JDEvhWHwzb2wm0t0E2QfUIfK2-KIqPNeLOqTTl0zQ1rNvFFId024V546O-Wuk_rupBqbWyY/3rq/iOVW3ByeSbebbjF2csDiyQ/h1/TZmgK-whLOiM-_P00P8sLi1OVRG3gjag6gPA0UXYW4g) **President Obama and I just had our rally stage here in Georgia.** It's an honor to have him by our side at this pivotal moment. [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE0Vd8nKqW85ZXV9rlZ14r6UtUEfpxpRFiPOSJMuOc_izw712zDLrtY4gsLC5Yo4Udehl9yRJxgooCe6spx2KZL0IdX8PrOMYluDdW7FgM8LYxI3pEKmhrp7WdpiXo7MmBefsi5hmh9qc5rSVnxcte-5zl0nFYgk_QsQGYZZIr0_jgqj8NPA7wtOZ50KvD7a8tb7P8VVRQkzUICOx2zTJlSRfwEX-cxSy4kypwQNX24UHFg0dJuusxYv2b_o_5NdtGJTYWsRocCAxDpDq-zZIpbWp-teYOqui6_RUR1V6Lli73vSjR2SHI3dhx7QAnplt-Ykp3SpvH_qBN3v6Yn1n7ddPJ-rvu7Xoq8avml9i6BBQlrNgNS2YUheYTKq5TQ6bPOZW3wNce8k-Ia6jccl8FBtoI3LksUV2AhYAiIiaMuhY86ICIed3QLt2khnYgaiCTw/3rq/iOVW3ByeSbebbjF2csDiyQ/h2/Cfe_tCZoaHAm1mX07MJM2Amn0gr1sA2GdTBkAQZqoMY) If you didn't get a chance to join our rally, here's what you need to know: TOMORROW, we're going to win this runoff election and keep Georgia blue.

But here’s the thing: Republicans know this, and they’re afraid. We narrowly led Herschel Walker in the general election – so now the GOP is flooding this race with more than $58 million to help Walker take the lead in this last day before the runoff election.

They won’t hold back, and neither can we. That’s why I urgently need your support to help hit our critical Rally Day goal before midnight tonight.

But here’s the thing: Republicans know this, and they’re afraid. name: Raphael Warnock
subject: Let's make history again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Sorry for the long email, but if you read one thing today, I hope this is it.
Sorry for the long email, but if you read one thing today, I hope this is it.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55597783/382163111/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5243-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDJjOGU4Yy1mMDc0LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xFc4U3jgXbtdWox6nbBoNiSndjDJZaWEfdcvSNpgSoc=)
Friend – I know you're probably getting a lot of emails about my election in Georgia tomorrow. But I wanted to personally reach out again to tell you why I'm in this fight and how grateful I am to have you by my side. _**Sorry for the long email, but if you read one thing today, I hope this is it.**_

**I'll start by saying: Scripture tells us joy comes in the morning – because with each new sunrise comes a new day full of possibility.**

But not every sunrise is one for the history books.

Rightfully so – most folks are more concerned about making a good life for themselves and their families than making history. Their hopes and dreams center on getting an education, putting food on the table, buying a home, and building a better future for their children and grandchildren.

When I ran for Senate for the first time two years ago, making history wasn't so much on my mind as was doing good work for those around me. I saw how everyday folks were hurting – and how our Republican-led government was doing nothing about it. I ran to give working people a seat at the table and restore moral leadership to Washington.

All the polls and pundits told us we couldn't win. But this grassroots team – _you_ ,_friend_ – proved them wrong and helped send me to Congress as the first Black senator in Georgia's history. Together, we proved that with hope, hard work, and the people by our side, anything is possible.
**Because I can tell you this much: My path was in no way preordained.** I grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia, and have 11 brothers and sisters. My family was short on money, but we were long on love and faith. Thanks to their support, I was the first in our family to graduate from college – and then went on to become the senior pastor at Ebenezer Baptist Church, the spiritual home of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. and John Lewis.

For the past two years, I've been humbled to represent Georgia in the Senate and to fight for a future in which every child can achieve their American dream, just like I did. I've led the fight to protect voting rights, provide pandemic relief to struggling families, lower everyday costs, and so much more.
**Now, I'm as ready as ever to _stay_ in Washington and continue waging these critical fights for justice. But tonight, o****n the eve of our runoff election, the eye of history is once again upon us, asking:**

Will you serve?

Will you step up and deliver for working people?

Will you protect our democracy from those who want to harm it and secure the future we deserve for all of our children?

**My answer is yes – a million times over, yes. But in order to succeed and write the next chapter of history, I need your help.**

I've seen the potential of this team – and without you, I simply cannot combat the tens of millions of dollars Republicans are spending against me. **The recent polling shows this race statistically tied, and the only way I can get out the vote, pull ahead, and win is with a final surge of grassroots support.**
**[Let's do this, friend. Please, will you chip in $5, or even $10, right now to help us make history once again in Georgia and deliver Democrats a 51-seat majority in the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55597784/382163112/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5243-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDJjOGU4Yy1mMDc0LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xFc4U3jgXbtdWox6nbBoNiSndjDJZaWEfdcvSNpgSoc=)**
Not every sunrise is one for the history books. But tomorrow's _can_ be – if we make it so. I hope you'll join me. Thank you for everything you do.

– Sen. Rev. Raphael Warnock
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55597785/382163114/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5243-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDJjOGU4Yy1mMDc0LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xFc4U3jgXbtdWox6nbBoNiSndjDJZaWEfdcvSNpgSoc=)

name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: [Update:] We did it! Giving Tuesday donation unlocked.
body:
Time sensitive

Peter - our Membership Drive deadline is a few days away, and we're reaching out because we haven't heard from you yet (renew your membership here and your contribution will be tripled https://links.messages.lcv. ).

The truth is your membership matters, and it's particularly critical right now.

Here's the situation: Earlier this month, Senator Joe Manchin backed away from a climate deal after months of negotiations, choosing to side with Big Oil and Republicans. It leaves the deal one vote short -- stalling any real action in Congress for now.

In response, we're redoubling our efforts on pushing the White House to act decisively on climate. The Biden administration has massive amounts of power to curb climate pollution - but that will only happen if the environmental movement makes it happen.

Right now, we're facing a critical test: the Biden administration is weighing a plan to block all new oil and gas drilling leases on public waters.

This could be huge -- and a decision is coming. Right now, we're organizing volunteers from all over the country to flood the administration with letters, pressuring Biden to hold to his promises.

Peter -- it's your membership support that makes victory possible here. But we have to do more. A group of donors has put together a fund to triple match every contribution before Sunday's membership deadline:

Can we count on your support? Claim your membership now - it only takes $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/04wrMWwkG0J-

The ban on new oil and gas leases is the first of many huge environmental decisions, Peter. And right now, we're pushing for serious action on so many fronts -- including:
Setting tight standards for power plants and other major emitters of climate pollution
Placing strict limits on air pollution to safeguard all communities Expediting requirements of 100% tailpipe pollution-free new cars by 2035 and trucks by 2040
Protecting communities from hazardous and super-polluting methane Conserving 30% of our public lands and waters by 2030 Declaring a climate emergency - and so much more. The best way you can help win each and every one of these fights right now is to claim your LCV membership - all it takes is a gift of $5 or more. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/L6b_

Thank you, thank you, thank you, Peter. This is such a critical moment for the environment, and we're so fortunate to have you on the team.

Onward,

Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=8982965&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY0MDExMjE3NgS2&spReportId=MTY0MDExMjE3NgS2. Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=8982965&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY0MDExMjE3NgS2&spReportId=MTY0MDExMjE3NgS2 from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 https://links.messages.lcv. https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=8982965&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY0MDExMjE3NgS2&spReportId=MTY0MDExMjE3NgS2

name: Team AOC
subject: A real person wrote this email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20221205-3676-header&t=1&akid=3676%2E2526796%2EaYgf-t)
Can we be real with you for a moment?
We understand that a constant stream of emails asking for a contribution can sometimes get on your nerves. That’s okay. Real people wrote this email, we get them as well. We understand how people can get frustrated. _But let us explain why this is vital._
When we’re asking for your support, we don’t expect every person to give. But we ask because we know that when you can support the cause, you will. That’s how this transformative movement works.**It’s a whole lot of people doing their part to make something great.**
[Right now, we’re approaching our final FEC deadline of the year, and we’re hoping to hit our goal of reaching 8,000 contributions before December 31. The only way we can get there is through the support of small-dollar donors chipping in whatever they can. If you have the means, can you donate $3 right now? It’ll go a long way.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221205-3676-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3676%2E2526796%2EaYgf-t)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221205-3676-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3676%2E2526796%2EaYgf-t)**
We’re not exaggerating. Most members of Congress fuel their reelection campaigns by dedicating hours of their time asking rich donors for $500, $1000, or even $2900 donations.
**Alexandria is different.** This whole movement is fueled by online contributions like the ones we’re asking for in this email. With these contributions, we’ve built a campaign that is...
1. Raising resources, recruiting volunteers, and making calls to help elect progressive allies across Congress, and build a progressive majority.
2. Reaching out to communities across NY-14 to spread awareness about the Green New Deal, how to influence local, state, and federal leaders, how to access medical abortion by mail, and more.
3. Raising money for community relief organizations, closing critical resources gaps that the federal government has left unfilled.
4. Working day and night to keep Alexandria in Congress and show the world what we can do.

[There are more than enough people reading this email that, if they just donated whatever they can spare, we’d be on track to hit our Q4 contribution targets. If this movement is the model of what you want in our politics, please donate today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221205-3676-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3676%2E2526796%2EaYgf-t)
Thanks for reading,
Team AOC
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221205-3676-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=3676%2E2526796%2EaYgf-t)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-202212?refcode=em20221205-3676-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=24&refcode2=3676_2526796_aYgf-t&akid=3676%2E2526796%2EaYgf-t)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20221205-3676-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=25&akid=3676%2E2526796%2EaYgf-t)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=26&akid=3676%2E2526796%2EaYgf-t) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=27&akid=3676%2E2526796%2EaYgf-t) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=28&akid=3676%2E2526796%2EaYgf-t)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=30&akid=3676%2E2526796%2EaYgf-t)

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Getting really serious about AIPAC.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, we have to
talk about AIPAC and what they did this last election cycle.

AIPAC — a group that claims to be bipartisan — showed everyone their true
colors this year when they spent millions of dollars against Summer Lee,
both in the primary election and in the general election when they failed
to defeat her.

AIPAC and DMFI spent an obscene amount of money against us this cycle.
They ran hateful, divisive attack ads against our candidates while
endorsing hundreds of extremist Republicans who want to overturn the 2020
election results.

AIPAC isn’t going to stop attacking us or our candidates. They are going
to keep working for Republican control of Congress. AIPAC is a dangerous
threat to the success of our progressive movement, to free and fair
elections, and even the future of our democracy.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/122619?refcode=em20221205-26411&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=26411%2E1203867%2Eoosiaw ]We need to start raising money now to fight back against AIPAC’s
millions of dollars, which is why we’re coming to you today: can you rush
a $2.70 donation so we can be more prepared for AIPAC’s future
attacks?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/122619?refcode=em20221205-26411&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=26411%2E1203867%2Eoosiaw ]Contribute $2.70

Bernie Sanders and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez have both rang the alarm on
AIPAC, saying:

Bernie Sanders: “This is a war for the future of the Democratic Party.”

AOC: “AIPAC is working for Republican control of Congress and further
destabilization of U.S. democracy.”

We’re in a fight for the soul of the Democratic Party.

Democratic Party leadership must denounce AIPAC and their active
campaigning for a Republican majority in Congress. But even if Democratic
Party leaders don’t step up, we will stand strong and continue to make
sure people know what AIPAC is doing to hurt Democrats.

Our fundraising continues to decline and we really need your support to be
sure we have the resources to go up against AIPAC and their million dollar
war-chest.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/122619?refcode=em20221205-26411&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=26411%2E1203867%2Eoosiaw ]We wouldn’t be asking if it wasn’t crucially important: Will you
please contribute $2.70 today? We’re counting on your
grassroots support.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=26411%2E1203867%2Eoosiaw ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.
